programme.title: I was a terrorist
programme.sub-title: now I run a kindergarten | Is Finland the best place in the world to be a parent?
programme.desc: Hendi Suhartono was part of a plot to detonate four book bombs and blow up a church in Indonesia. He spent seven years in prison after going through a deradicalisation process. After Hendi was released from prison, he received support to open a kindergarten. Hendi meets a friend from his past, Pepi Fernando, and they discuss what led to his radicalisation, the time in prison, his subsequent deradicalisation and how he is devoted to his community. | Finland is a world leader when it comes to early years education. Childcare is affordable and nursery places are universally available in a system that puts children's rights at the centre of decision-making.

programme.title: Can women save sumo? The crossroads facing Japan's national sport
programme.desc: The ancient Japanese sport of sumo is in well-documented crisis. Years of controversy and scandal have hurt the sport's ability to attract new talent. But new energy is brewing in Tokyo's Ryōgoku district, where the sport is slowly adapting to life in the 21st century, and where - despite being banned from the professional ring itself - women are flocking to watch it like never before. Will it be enough to save Japan's national sport in the 21st century?

programme.title: Somali Night Fever
programme.desc: In the 1970s and 80s Mogadishu's airwaves were filled with Somali funk, disco, soul and reggae. Musicians rocking afros and bell-bottom trousers would perform at the city's trendiest nightclubs during the height of the country's golden era of music. But it was short-lived: a brutal civil war began, musicians fled to all corners of the world and the vibrant music scene came to an end.

programme.title: My life in a hotel room: Ireland's hidden homeless crisis
programme.desc: Nuala and her teenage daughter, Laura, were suddenly evicted from their Dublin home when their landlord of 10 years was forced to sell by his creditors. They haven't been able to find a new place to rent. Despite having been on the council house waiting list for more than six years they are still only around 600th in line. Now, like almost 10,000 other people and 1,700 families across Ireland, Nuala and Laura are homeless..

programme.title: Blood, sweat and fears: special report on abuse towards grassroots football referees
programme.desc: The FA has rebooted its Respect Campaign this season to protect grassroots referees in England but many continue to suffer both mental and physical abuse. There are some horrifying stories but hope remains: as of 2019-20 season a new sin-bin system will be rolled out across all grassroots leagues for anybody caught abusing a referee, with other initiatives also in the pipeline.

programme.title: Skyward: birdwatching is belonging for two teenage conservationists
programme.desc: Young birdwatchers Mya and Arjun feel the pressure of climate breakdown and the biodiversity crisis. As two reserved teenagers on the cusp of adulthood, they find comfort in birdwatching while being distant from their peers. Fascinated by migratory patterns, Mya spends her time searching for rare bird species, while Arjun is captivated by the beauty of birdsong. As their passion for nature inspires them to raise awareness of conservation and the climate emergency in their communities, they find themselves and their voices, emerging as local leaders among a new generation of conservationists.

programme.title: Finding Ashley | Murder, corruption and cattle barons in Kenya
programme.desc: Finding Ashley: a Native American family's desperate search for their missing relative | Murder, corruption and cattle barons in Kenya

programme.title: Saintmaking: the canonisation of Derek Jarman by queer 'nuns'
programme.desc: This year marks the 30th anniversary of film-maker Derek Jarman's canonisation by an activist group of gay male 'nuns' known as the Sisters of Perpetual Indulgence. At the time in 1991, Derek Jarman was the most prominent person in the UK living openly with HIV. He was outspoken, radical and unapologetically queer. The perfect antidote, in the Sisters' eyes, to Ian McKellen's acceptance of a knighthood in the 1991 new year honours.

programme.title: Happy birthday
programme.desc: For years, global music publisher Warner/Chappell claimed copyright of the Happy Birthday song, demanding payment for any public performance of it. Jenn Nelson tells the story of her four-year campaign to prove that the company did not in fact own the rights to the world-famous song, whose tune was composed by two sisters in Kentucky in 1893. A judge's decision on 30 June to approve a $14m settlement means the song is now in the public domain

programme.title: The 'Lost Rambos' of Papua New Guinea: how weapons and Hollywood changed tribal disputes
programme.desc: Tribal fighting has long been present in the Papua New Guinea highlands but the influx of modern automatic weaponry in the 1990s turned local disputes into lethal exchanges that threatened to permanently reshape highlands culture. Bootleg copies of the US film Rambo circulated in remote communities, becoming a crude tutorial on the use of such weaponry. The film's influence was so pronounced that the term Rambo is used in Papuan dialects to describe hired mercenaries.

programme.title: Ireland's forgotten mixed-race child abuse victims
programme.desc: Rosemary Adaser was one of many mixed-race children considered illegitimate who was brought up in institutions run by the Catholic church in Ireland between the 1950s and 1970s. She tells of the abuse and racist treatment she suffered, and returns to her school in Kilkenny for the first time in 40 years and attempts to answer questions about her past.

programme.title: Our House
programme.desc: Brian was down on his luck and sleeping rough in Liverpool. Lawrence was a successful hotelier and property developer. David was a self-proclaimed hippy in a dead-end job. Together they formed an unlikely alliance and created a homeless shelter like no other. But can it last?

programme.title: The Cambridge Analytica Files: The Cambridge Analytica Files
programme.desc: A year-long investigation into Facebook, data, and influencing elections in the digital age.

programme.title: Crossing the line: Crossing The Line
programme.desc: 10 Middle Eastern artists undertake a road trip across the US, exploring common concerns between the US and the Middle East. Made in collaboration with Culturunners.

programme.title: Seascape: the state of our oceans
programme.desc: A series drawing attention to the dramatic changes taking place in our oceans, and the innovations under way to tackle them

programme.title: Republic of Doyle
programme.desc: A young woman comes to The Doyles with one case -- to find her unknown biological father -- but they end up solving three Jake is distracted by Leslie while trying to extract himself from Nikki.

programme.title: Children Ruin Everything
programme.desc: James and Astrid attempt to get some alone time, but the kids keep getting in the way. Meanwhile, Dawn and Bo renew their vows.

programme.title: Children Ruin Everything
programme.desc: While Astrid is away on a business trip, James struggles to keep the Tooth Fairy tradition alive.

programme.title: Short Poppies
programme.desc: Rhod Gainer is the local lawyer, though he appears to have little regard for the law. Played by Rhys Darby, Rhod is a car enthusiast who gets himself in more trouble than his clients through his inability to engage brain before speaking!

programme.title: Short Poppies
programme.desc: Louise Cooper is a local artist and would-be man-eater. When David Farrier comes to town her radar is immediately on him. Played by Rhys Darby, Louise is one of the charmingly oddest people David Farrier has met yet. Sam Neill guest stars.

programme.title: Short Poppies
programme.desc: Rhys Darby plays Terry Pole, a lifeguard and leg model. It is the day of the local Sexy Legs Competition when David Farrier is in town, and Terry believes some of his competitors have resorted to sabotage to keep him from winning. Features Stephen Merchant.

programme.title: Conan O Brien TV
programme.desc: Conan gets down to business with the stars of The Office.

programme.title: Conan O Brien TV
programme.desc: Conan gets blinded by the science of sitcoms with the cast and creator of The Big Bang Theory.

programme.title: Conan O Brien TV
programme.desc: Producers want actors to audition for roles for a very obvious reason - they may not fit the part. At all.

programme.title: America's Got Talent
programme.desc: Contestants perform for a panel of expert judges showcasing a wide variety of talents.

programme.title: Arnie's 50 Greatest Ever Stunt
programme.desc: Original action man Arnold Schwarzenegger counts down the world's most daring, jaw-dropping stunts, with clips and behind-the-scenes access with stunt professionals.

programme.title: Jekyll and Hyde
programme.desc: Garson tells Robert his ancestors unleashed their dual identities with medication.

programme.title: Ill Gotten Gains
programme.desc: Today's episode follows the City of London police from the outset of a proceeds of crime investigation, hot on the trail of an international fraudster.

programme.title: Ill Gotten Gains
programme.desc: Police in Derbyshire target a drug dealer, and look to seize all the money he has been making illegally. And we follow the vital operation at sea that Border Force launched to find a fishing boat, with a very illegal cargo.

programme.title: Las Vegas with Trevor McDonald
programme.desc: In the first episode, Trevor tracks down one of Vegas's most famous – and not to mention, infamous – residents, former undisputed heavyweight champion of the world, Mike Tyson.

programme.title: Las Vegas with Trevor McDonald
programme.desc: In the second episode of Trevor's journey into Sin City he meets mobster Andrew Didonato, a former member of the New York mafia's biggest crime family, the Gambinos.

programme.title: El Chapo & Sean Penn: Bungle in the Jungle
programme.desc: A behind-the-scenes look inside the ill-fated rendezvous with Sean Penn, El Chapo and actress Kate Del Castillo. El Chapo, the most wanted, most dangerous and richest drug lord in the world, agreed to meet Penn in the remote mountains of Sinaloa state to grant the first and only interview since he escaped from Mexico's number one security prison. For the first time, cameras go inside that rendezvous and reveal the true story of what happened behind the scenes, who orchestrated the meeting, the identities of the two mystery men travelling with Penn and the secret Hollywood figure who's really pulling strings, with a $6 million offer for El Chapo's life story rights. What was the real reason that Sean Penn took this risky and reckless journey? What was the real motive for the actress Kate Del Castillo to set up a meeting that could have led to both their deaths? And what were the secret texts between El Chapo and Kate, long before the day of the 'Bungle In The Jungle'?

programme.title: Inside Lehman Brothers: The Story Goes On
programme.desc: The falling, in 2008, of Lehman Brothers, plunged the world into one of the biggest recessions of all times. In a captivating investigation, Jennifer Deschamps looks at what caused the loss of a bank above suspicion.

programme.title: Wives With Knives

programme.title: Craig Charles: Ufo Conspiracies
programme.desc: Craig and Sarah take on the US Navy's Unidentified Aerial Phenomenon videos: the 'Tic-Tac' footage, filmed from the USS Nimitz in 2004, and the 'Go-Fast' and 'Gimbal' videos filmed between 2014 and 2015 from the USS Theodore Roosevelt.

programme.title: Craig Charles: Ufo Conspiracies
programme.desc: Craig and Sarah pore over every scrap of available evidence relating to the Rendlesham incident, including the audio recording made by Lieutenant Colonel Charles Halt when he and a patrol of men investigated lights in the forest that fateful night.

programme.title: Craig Charles: Ufo Conspiracies
programme.desc: Central Scotland has its own Area 51, known as the 'Falkirk Triangle', encompassing the now infamous village of Bonnybridge, which claims the highest concentration of the region's UFO activity. Craig and Sarah examine the Scottish UFO phenomenon.

programme.title: Craig Charles: Ufo Conspiracies
programme.desc: In 1997, over the city of Phoenix, Arizona, a mass UFO sighting took place. Thousands of people witnessed a series of bright orange orbs moving in formation silently overhead. Craig and Sarah take on the extraordinary 'Phoenix Lights' case.

programme.title: Craig Charles: Ufo Conspiracies
programme.desc: Craig and Sarah stop at nothing to get to the bottom of policeman Alan Godfrey's claims of a UFO sighting and subsequent alien abduction in Todmorden, West Yorkshire, in November 1980.

programme.title: Craig Charles: Ufo Conspiracies
programme.desc: In January 2008, a shadow was cast over the town of Stephenville, Texas, when a UFO passed overhead at supersonic speed. Craig and Sarah speak to an eyewitness and investigate a possible military cover-up of the incident.

programme.title: Craig Charles: Ufo Conspiracies
programme.desc: In October 2017, astronomers observed the very first visitor from interstellar space, 'Oumuamua'. Craig and Sarah speak with SETI scientists regarding its origin, and the possibility of extra-terrestrial life.

programme.title: Conspiracy Files Unsealed
programme.desc: Conspiracy Files looks at a number of end-of-the-world scenarios and considers the inevitability of doomsday. It also looks at the question of whether world governments would conspire with each other to cover up knowledge of the end-of-the-world.

programme.title: Dragons' Den CA
programme.desc: In business, it's all about the pitch – that elusive ability of an entrepreneur to stand tall, talk smart, and capture an audience whenever and wherever opportunity knocks. Each week, with big investment dollars on the line, real-life business owners must pitch like a pro under the dead-eyed scrutiny of five self-made business titans, known as 'The Dragons'. Succeed in this high stakes environment and the reward could be life changing, as the aspiring entrepreneur not only secures financing but the prestige of a coveted Dragon as a mentor and partner. Sold in every continent, Dragons' Den shows viewers around the world the inspiring stories of hard-working business owners and the transformational power of entrepreneurship.

programme.desc: In business, it's all about the pitch – that elusive ability of an entrepreneur to stand tall, talk smart, and capture an audience whenever and wherever opportunity knocks. Each week, with big investment dollars on the line, real-life business owners must pitch like a pro under the dead-eyed scrutiny of five self-made business titans, known as 'The Dragons'. Succeed in this high stakes environment and the reward could be life changing, as the aspiring entrepreneur not only secures financing but the prestige of a coveted Dragon as a mentor and partner. Sold in every continent, Dragons' Den shows viewers around the world the inspiring stories of hard-working business owners and the transformational power of entrepreneurship.

programme.title: Shipwrecks: When History Resurfaces
programme.desc: The Allied invasion of southern France in August 1944. Though successful, it highlighted the intense disagreements the Allies had concerning strategy. It has been termed by some as `the other D-Day'.

programme.title: Ross Kemp
programme.desc: Ross completes his specialist SCUBA training under the expert tutelage of dive Supervisor Neil Brock, and inspired by the stories of his shipwrecked relatives, he heads up to the Royal Navy's historic naval base in the far northerly Orkney Islands.

programme.title: Ross Kemp
programme.desc: Ross first takes on the largest wrecks in Scapa Flow: Germany's sunken WWI fleet. Ross tries to understand why the proud German fleet ended up at the bottom. The trail leads to an experimental British aircraft carrier submarine.

programme.title: Ross Kemp
programme.desc: Ross prepares to explore the wreck of a sunken steam-age ship, the Iona II. The ship went down with a mystery cargo on board. Determined to solve the mystery, Ross meets with a maritime historian who has uncovered the Iona II's shocking purpose.

programme.title: Ross Kemp
programme.desc: Ross tries to find out more about his sea-faring Great Grandfather, Arthur ‘Pop' Chalmers. He discovers that Pop served in the Merchant Navy and survived three shipwrecks. Inspired to know more, he links up with maritime archaeologist, Mallory Haas.

programme.title: Ross Kemp
programme.desc: The Mary Rose: In preparation for his deepest ever dive, Ross returns to training with dive master Neil Brock and explores the site of Britain's most famous wreck: the Mary Rose.

programme.title: Ross Kemp
programme.desc: Suez: Ross hops from Portsmouth to Plymouth and explores a coastline littered with treasures. A bout of hypercapnia leaves Ross shaken after the dive of a 17th century shipwreck.

programme.title: The Great House Revival
programme.desc: Dublin born Fiona Kelly has serious ambition. Having purchased a dilapidated Georgian terraced house in the heart of Phibsborough in north Dublin, she has a mammoth project on her hands. With slanted door frames, crooked floors and a tumbling roof, Fiona and her building contractor friend Philip, have taken on a building on the brink of collapse. Once an impressive townhouse for a well-to-do tradesman, Fiona's house has been witness to the passing fortunes and misfortunes of Dublin over the centuries, and was occupied as a tenement home right up to the 1960s.

programme.title: The Great House Revival
programme.desc: With three children all under the age of 5, Belinda and Lorcan Carpenter have decided to convert three farmyard barns into their dream family home. Set in the picturesque hills of the Wicklow Carlow border on the grounds of Belinda's childhood home Munny House, the barns need extensive renovation and conversion work in order to transform the dilapidated donkey house into a bespoke family home. Belinda has many a vivid memory of her childhood in Munny Farm playing in the stables, grooming horses, and feeding the beloved donkey Ned. She now hopes to create many more fond memories not just for her, but for her husband Lorcan and the three children, with a budget of €250,000.

programme.title: The Great House Revival
programme.desc: Karen Whyte and her partner Donnacha Curley, purchased Grove House a few years ago with a plan to save it from dereliction. Empty for years, the building was damp, water-damaged, and largely unloved. A native of Westport, Karen is keen to restore the building back to the grand home it once was. Purchasing Grove House for €117,500, the home is a whopping 10,500 sq. ft. with a further 3,500sq ft. in the basement, so this restoration is no small task. Changing times have meant changing purposes for the building, from private home it became a bank, then a boarding school, and most recently it was flats.

programme.title: The Great House Revival
programme.desc: Ronan and Charles are the proud owners of Kilglass House in Longford, an 18th century former rectory in dire need of rescuing. Born and reared in London, Ronan is fulfilling his immigrant parent's dream of returning home to Ireland. From the bustling streets of central London to the quiet rolling hills of Longford, the culture-shock is the least of their concerns – Kilglass House requires urgent attention to save it from the encroaching damp, falling ceilings and crumbling rendering. The couple spent their initial €125,000 budget on the structural work needed to keep the house from falling apart, losing three rooms which collapsed along the way.

programme.title: The Unsellables
programme.desc: The 14 members (and three generations) of the Akthar family need to live apart but are trapped by the current property market in an unsellable Victorian terrace in Bradford, West Yorkshire. Desperate for an offer, they have cut the price and sacked their agent. And now 20-year-old Shumi is marketing the home herself. The structurally impressive, six-bedroom property features two spacious reception rooms, and an ideal location close to the city centre… But with its garbled décor, dodgy DIY, Spartan kitchen, and graffiti-enhanced bedroom, the home is completely unsellable.

programme.title: The Unsellables
programme.desc: David and Suzanne want to sell their nine-acre property in Bardon Mill, Northumberland, to start a full-time equestrian centre on a larger farm. But despite shaving £50,000 off the price, they've had just five viewings in a year, and not a single offer. While the idyllic setting features four stalls, spectacular views, and a picturesque village nearby, the three-bedroom home's soulless, charm-free interiors are a major turnoff complete with peeling wallpaper, purposeless rooms, and dated, mismatched furniture.

programme.title: The Unsellables
programme.desc: David and Mary are desperate to move closer to their grandchildren, but after 18 months on the market and a staggering £90,000 price cut, their East Boldon family home of 30 years has only been viewed once. With its three reception rooms, mature garden, and seaside location, the immaculate three-bedroom, 1920s townhouse would be perfect for a young family… But with no one coming to view the home, there is no hope of a sale.

programme.title: The Unsellables
programme.desc: With a three-hour commute to Dad's new job (and to the family's temporary crash pad in the neighbourhood), the Kinchleas are desperate to sell their three-bedroom, Victorian mid-terrace home in Bow, East London… But after ten months on the market, only ten viewings, and not a single offer, they fear their upside-down lifestyle may be permanent. The home features a great location and plenty of period charm. But its phantom fourth bedroom, cluttered kitchen, over-personalized bedrooms, and overall shabby interiors are turning potential buyers off. Even a £40,000 price cut hasn't made a difference.

programme.title: The Unsellables
programme.desc: Tired of his long daily commute, Gary wants to sell his riverside property next to London's Limehouse Basin and move closer to work… But after six months, only four viewings, and not a single offer, his home is languishing on the market. On the plus side, the three-bedroom, three-bathroom home offers a Thames-view balcony and is close to central London, but with its bachelor pad living room, frilly, pastel-coloured master suite, and confusing guest bedroom-cum-dining room, the property is completely unsellable.

programme.title: Discovering Canary Islands: La Gomera
programme.desc: The journey continues on the island of La Gomera, with a first test in the lush Garajonay National Park where the contestants will have to grope blindly for a series of "objects" that will determine the rest of the episode. From there, they will "leap" over to the Gran Rey Valley to perform another type of leap, the so-called "shepherd's leap" that the ancient dwellers of the island used to move swiftly over the mountainous terrain. This will enable the contestants to find more "objects". All the "objects" achieved thus far will come into their own at Playa del Inglés beach, where the strength and coordination of each team will be vital in the final challenge of this stage.

programme.desc: Chrissy Morrissey honors ANZAC Day from Kings Park, reflecting on the sacrifices of servicemen and women, including her own grandfather.

programme.title: Xplore Spain, Madrid (Eng)
programme.desc: Alex visits an art museum and a vibrant market, dines in the world's oldest restaurant and explores the city on a segway ride, in Madrid.

programme.title: Backpack Pozarevac, Serbia(Eng)
programme.desc: Heather explores Požarevac and visits the ancient town of Viminacium. Later visits National Museum, concluding with Majdanpek's Rajkova Pecina Caves.

programme.title: Viajar Mexico ,Campeche Mexico(Eng)
programme.desc: From dolphin-filled lagoons to colonial charm, Charlie introduces the treasures of the least visited state on the Yucatan peninsula, Campeche.

programme.title: City Breaks Bikaner (ENG)
programme.desc: Bikaner is known to most people as the city of world-famous savoury snacks. When Asmita goes there for a whirlwind trip, however, she discovers that there is a lot more to Rajasthan's Red City than meets the eye. From the miniature paintings that can be found on the walls of palaces and mansions across the city to the elaborate architecture of the former havelis of merchants, she finds out that Bikaner is an art lover's paradise.

programme.title: Xplore Spain, Valencia 1 Spain(Eng)
programme.desc: In Valencia, Alex visits Bioparc, Mercado Central and the former silk exchange. She also tries delectable tapas and local fare.

programme.title: Backpack Majdanpek, Serbia(Eng)
programme.desc: Explore Majdanpek with our host as the city brings the viewers closer to the treasures strewn across the Serbian countryside.

programme.title: Viajar Mexico, Merida Mexico(Eng)
programme.desc: In the historic city of Merida, Charlie shows around the underground pools, which narrate stories of Mayan beliefs.

programme.title: Backpack Nis, Serbia(Eng)
programme.desc: Heather explores Nis,one of the oldest cities in Europe.She visits a concentration camp and later paraglides to end by watching a musical performance.

programme.title: Costa Rica Calling, Cartago( Eng)
programme.desc: Genevieve visits the charming town of Zarcero, where she chances upon the prized cheese of Costa Rica.

programme.title: Viajar Mexoco, Cancun Mexico(Eng)
programme.desc: Secret diving spots, under-the-radar lagoons, ancient Mayan ruins – there is a lot more to the Yucatan peninsula than Cancun and Playa del Carmen.

programme.title: Xplore Spain, Valencia 2 Spain(Eng)
programme.desc: Exploring more of Valencia, Alex visits Spain's oldest stadium, a bullfighting ring and Europe's largest marine aquarium, and she learns flamenco.

programme.title: Viajar Mexico, Merida Mexico(Eng)
programme.desc: In the historic city of Merida, Charlie shows around the underground pools, which narrate stories of Mayan beliefs.

programme.title: Xplore Spain, Valencia 1 Spain(Eng)
programme.desc: In Valencia, Alex visits Bioparc, Mercado Central and the former silk exchange. She also tries delectable tapas and local fare.

programme.title: Backpacking Lake Powell, Utah
programme.desc: Eric treks the canyons and waters of Lake Powell, Utah on foot and via packraft.

programme.title: Backpacking Urban California
programme.desc: Eric leaves the backcountry to discover urban hiking adventures in the cities of Los Angeles and San Francisco, California.

programme.title: Lucky in Love Ep 1
programme.desc: Canadians Sophie and Anna go on a journey of discovery, luck and love in the Cradle of Liberty, Boston, Massachusetts.

programme.title: Lucky in Love Ep 2
programme.desc: Gabby and Jono try their luck in panoramic Salt Lake City, Utah.

programme.title: Lucky in Love Ep 3
programme.desc: Percy and Michelle go on a game of chance in the Emerald city of Seattle.

programme.title: Paul & Nicks Big American Food Trip
programme.desc: Paul and Nick meet with Colin Brooks of the 1718 project, founded to investigate the historical links between Ulster, Scotland and Philadelphia. They also cook for Randall Redman, who claims to be able to trace his ancestry to Robert The Bruce.

programme.title: Paul & Nicks Big American Food Trip
programme.desc: Philadelphia was one of the main entry ports for immigrants to America in the 18th century. Paul and Nick meet Drew McGinty and Joyce Alexander, the founder of the Center for Ulster-Scots Studies. Our chefs try to cook an Ulster-Scots meal, but keep being seduced by Italian fare.

programme.title: Neighborhood knockouts
programme.desc: Guy Fieri searches up and down the West Coast for funky neighborhood joints. In San Diego, a breakfast joint serves up creme brulee French toast. In Portland, a couple offers Americana like corned beef hash.

programme.title: Lots of Latin
programme.desc: Guy Fieri is loading up on all kinds of Latin on this trip. In Logan, Utah, a Salvadoran spot is puttin' out pupusas, and a funky food truck in Denver is dishing out prime-time Puerto Rican specialties.

programme.title: Finger Lickin' Food
programme.desc: On this trip, Guy Fieri visits Atlanta, Minneapolis and Massachusetts to find grub that doesn't require a knife and fork.

programme.title: Secret Sanctuaries
programme.desc: Hidden gems at America's most beautiful locations are highlighted, from jaw-dropping views at Redwood National Park to gourmet grub at a gas station in Yosemite.

programme.title: Remote Revelations
programme.desc: Off-the-grid adventures at America's most beautiful locations are highlighted, from a spooky mansion outside of Yellowstone National Park to a UFO watchtower in Great Sand Dunes National Park.

programme.title: Mystic Marvels
programme.desc: Mind-blowing marvels at America's most beautiful locations are highlighted, from Death Valley's mysterious sailing stones to a man-made mirage in Joshua Tree National Park.

programme.title: Bondi Vet
programme.desc: Observe a tiger tooth extraction, a scary tick bite, and guide-dog training.

programme.title: Bondi Vet
programme.desc: Join Chris as he delivers puppies at a local prison and saves a run-over python.

programme.title: Bondi Vet
programme.desc: Journey to Cairns for a bullock's surgery, and meet a turtle who needs an X-ray.

programme.title: Bondi Vet
programme.desc: Experience canine water therapy and see how a cat-snake spat turns dangerous.

programme.title: Bondi Vet
programme.desc: Tim tries to extract a python from a pipe while Chris treats an injured husky.

programme.title: Vet On The Hill
programme.desc: Meet a scary Rottweiler and an ill spaniel, and hear about a baby on the way.

programme.title: Vet On The Hill
programme.desc: Follow two naughty chipmunks, an ailing cat, and a dog that needs a nose job.

programme.title: Pick a Puppy
programme.desc: Appraise energetic breeds, like shih tzus, that can tire out a pack of kids.

programme.title: Pick a Puppy
programme.desc: Connect with three sweet rescues who aim to charm their way into a busy family.

programme.title: Catherine
programme.desc: She provided the huge kingdom with an administrative framework, reformed the educational system and secured a place for Russia among the great powers of Europe.

programme.title: Diana at Sixty
programme.desc: A new insight into the People's Princess, Lady Diana, With interviews from those who knew her best looking at her life, loves and where she might be today. We reveal why she was much loved the world over and became bigger than The Crown itself. ‘Diana at Sixty' features insights from the late royal's friends and contemporaries: from her personal astrologer to Hillary Clinton.

programme.title: Queen Silvia of Sweden
programme.desc: Welcome to Stockholm and to the Royal Palace. In this day and age, royal families seem to make headline only when they get married, or when the popular press knows scandals about their private lives. Here in Sweden there are rumours, of course, and sometimes headlines, but the fact remains, the monarchy is very popular, and especially the Queen, Queen Silvia, by far the most admired and loved person in Sweden. Her Majesty the Queen has accepted to see us.

programme.title: The Romanovs
programme.desc: No other family has shaped Russia as much as the Romanovs. For three centuries, the tsarist dynasty ruled over the largest country in the world. The Romanovs manifested their power through marriage politics, armed force and dictatorial rigour. Myths and legends surround the ruling dynasty. Great names are associated with them, revered and feared in equal measure.

programme.title: Inside Buckingham Palace
programme.desc: From Queen Victoria to Queen Elizabeth II and all the ceremonies and scandals inbetween, enter the world of Buckingham Palace.

programme.title: Harry: The Mysterious Prince
programme.desc: Who is the 'real' Prince Harry?

programme.title: The Future Queen of Denmark
programme.desc: An openhearted portrait of 32-year-old Mary Donaldson, who in May 2004 marries His Royal Highness, Crown Prince Frederik of Denmark - thus becoming a member of one of the oldest monarchies of the world.

programme.desc: A wedding car crashes, resulting in Bean coming to the rescue and offering the bride a lift.

programme.title: Bean Phone

programme.title: Hotel Bean

programme.title: Jurassic Bean

programme.title: Caring Bean

programme.title: Opera Bean

programme.title: Muscle Bean
programme.desc: Mr. Bean needs to impress Irma, who is infatuated with the hunky deliveryman.

programme.desc: A small bird wants to befriend Mr. Bean, but its squawking sound annoys Mrs. Wicket.

programme.title: The Lift

programme.desc: On Halloween night, Mr. Bean prepares to give the children some tricks and treats they won't forget.

programme.title: A Round of Golf
programme.desc: Mr. Bean fancies a game of golf.

programme.title: Superhero Bean

programme.title: What A Load Of Rubbish
programme.desc: Mr. Bean is a bit too enthusiastic while cleaning his flat and Teddy ends up on his way to the dump.

programme.title: The Robot
programme.desc: Mr. Bean buys a robot to clean his flat, but it ends up creating destruction across London.

programme.title: The Hands Of Time
programme.desc: Master Wu mistakenly tries to single-handedly complete a battle he began decades ago against Acronix, one of the twin Hands of Time. But the arrival of the first Time Blade – a weapon with the power to speed up time – sends the Ninja to the Monastery just in time to rescue their master from certain doom.

programme.title: The Hatching
programme.desc: The Ninja learn more about the Krux and Acronix – the two fallen Elemental Masters known as the Hands of Time – and are sure that this threat has finally been eliminated. But with Wu out of action and suffering from the effects of the Time Punch, the Ninja discover a new enemy in their midst: The Vermillion Warriors. And the Ninjas have no idea who controls them...

programme.title: A Time Of Traitors
programme.desc: Kai's investigation of a Vermillion Warrior Helmet leads him to discover that Krux is alive and well in Ninjago, living under an assumed identity. Meanwhile, as the Vermillion Warriors go on a kidnapping spree, Lloyd struggles with his role as master-in-training and Nya does her best to reboot Zane, who was knocked off line in his first battle with the Vermillion.

programme.title: The Mask Of Deception
programme.desc: When an unknown criminal syndicate threatens the Royal Family, the Ninja are called back into action and must protect the royal princess and a fabled artifact that may hold supernatural powers. The ninja find themselves scattered to the four corners of the kingdom. Cole and Jay are searching in vain for some sign of Master Wu. Nya fights injustice in the north, while Kai and Zane attempt to fend off an angry lava beast in the west. This leaves Lloyd alone in Ninjago City. He rushes to the scene of a heist at Borg Tower and finds himself up against a team of highly trained operatives led by the mysterious masked MISTER-E. Lloyd fails to prevent the heist and an ancient artifact, the MASK OF DECEPTION, is stolen. Lloyd apprehends one of the criminals but the others escape. Dismayed by his failure, Lloyd calls the ninjas back to Ninjago. The friends are reunited and hope for a little rest and relaxation. These hopes are dashed with the arrival MASTER HUTCHINS, a servant of the Royal Family of Ninjago, who has been sent by the EMPEROR to request their help. A new criminal gang, SONS OF GARMADON (SOG), is attempting to acquire three ancient masks called the ONI MASKS, which are rumored to possess supernatural powers.

programme.title: The Gray Knight
programme.desc: Using his Stone to Life magic the Cloud of Monstrox turns Clay into a living, fighting, breathing stone fighting knight. But will Clay use his forces to fight for good or for evil? Does he have a choice? The Cloud of Monstrox and Jestro are able to unlock the forbidden Power Shocking Scare and unleash an attack on the village of Bravington. Knights in their new vehicles rush to the rescue and are able to defeat him with a new Combo Power. In the heat of the battle, the Cloud of Monstrox sees the stone statue of Clay and zaps him to life! Clay is now turned, and is fighting against his friends. It is impossible for them to defeat him without destroying him for good. The Cloud urges Clay on. He attacks the Fortrex in order to get to Merlok. Robin in his Black Knight Mech is trying to stop him, but to no avail. Merlok 2.0 is left undefended. At the very last moment Merlok 2.0 unleashes a blasting spell that sends Clay far far away.

programme.title: The Good, The Bad And The Tightwad
programme.desc: Clay wakes up in the poor town of Nothing Hill which literally have nothing. Will Clay remember who he is and what he is fighting for. His friends try to help him, but Jorah Tightwad and his Bots get in the way. Clay as the Gray Knight wakes up far away in a place called Nothing Hill. A poor town where they literally have nothing. They harvest dust. Jorah Tightwad though has found that there is gold underneath the town. He convinces the confused Clay to help him put pressure on the poor townsfolk to give up their lots. This is an easy job for the strong Gray Knight. The NEXO KNIGHTS finally track him down and tries to convince him about who he is. But to the Gray Knight they are still his enemies, and a giant battle ensues in order to subdue the Gray Knight. At last, only Macy is left. When she begins to recite the Knights Code, some words and their meaning are able to get through the stone hard shell of the Gray Knight and the Evil that clouded him seems to disappear. Together they are able to return the ownership of the town to the villagers.

programme.title: The Book Of Monsters, Part 1
programme.desc: When Jestro the Jester finds the Book of Monsters, chaos breaks loose in the Kingdom of Knighton. Can the newly graduated Knights from the Knights' Academy save the kingdom? It's final graduation fighting exams for the latest Knights from Knights' Academy. All our new Knights demonstrate their prowess: CLAY, AARON, AXL and LANCE. PRINCESS MACY get to join them, but her father doesn't want her to graduate. As part of the entertainment, MERLOK does an amazing magic trick. His act is followed by…JESTRO, the King's Jester. He's terrible (and he should know to never follow a better act.) Everyone laughed because he's a real joke....a total failure. While Jestro roams the halls fo the King's Castle, forlorn, he hears the BOOK OF MONSTERS calling to him from Merlok's library. The book talks Jestro into gathering as many books of spells as he can carry, but they're interrupted by...Clay! As Jestro quickly pages through the Book of Monsters to attack Clay, Merlok arrives. There's a battle in the library between Jestro and Merlok. Finally, the wizard summons up his most powerful spell in self-defence. BOOM! There's a big, magical explosion and when Clay forces his way back into the library, Merlok, Jestro and the magic books are...GONE!

programme.title: The Book Of Monsters, Part 2
programme.desc: Realizing they must defend the Kingdom from Jestro's monsters, the Knights try to organize but are despondent when they discover their best advisor – Merlok the Magician – has sacrificed himself to save them. When Jestro awakens, he's been blasted miles and miles away from the King's Castle by Merlok's explosive spell. And, it seems, all the books he was trying to steal have been scattered, too. The Book of Monsters broke Jestro' fall and now he can use the book to attack the people who laughed at him. Meanwhile, the King and his newly-trained Knights pick through the rubble of Merlok's library. They'll have to figure something out, because Jestro and his newly made magic monsters attack King's Castle! Clay organizes the Knights to defend the kingdom, but they've never worked together before. It takes all their training, plus the help of an old friend…MERLOK! Only now he's MERLOK 2.0. Ava has been piecing together what happened and discovering that the “ghost in the machine” she's been chasing is really Merlok in digital form. Now, he can use his magic digitally and he downloads just the right weapons to the struggling Knights! They finally foil Jestro's attack with Merlok's help and officially become NEXO KNIGHTS!

programme.title: Chased Dreamers
programme.desc: To craft their own hourglasses and become official Dream Chasers for the Night Bureau, Mateo and his friends must defeat the Dream Forge guardian.

programme.title: The Dream Forge
programme.desc: As time runs out to face the Dream Forge and become official Dream Chasers, Mateo and his friends enlist the help of the mysterious Dream Bandit.

programme.title: Legendary Places, Ninjago's Most Wanted
programme.desc: Cole joins Jay and Zane inside the Nindroid to solve a mysterious puzzle and also Kai enters Zane's mind and suggests the Ninja take a break from puzzle-solving to figure out which villain is trying to hack their friend.

programme.title: The Jade Princess
programme.desc: In the wake of an assassination attempt targeting the royal family, the ninja invite the royal princess, HARUMI, into their makeshift family. Lloyd glimpses someone escaping over the rooftops with a sack on their back. Fearing it is the kidnapped princess, Lloyd takes up the chase! He discovers to his surprise, however, that the masked intruder is none other than the princess herself, who is not quite as docile or meek as she pretends. She has a habit of sneaking out of her chambers at night to feed the homeless who surround the Imperial Palace. This revelation only endears her to Lloyd more and Harumi and Lloyd quickly strike up a friendship. Unfortunately, trouble catches up to the ninja when the Sons Of Garmadon target the second Oni mask and attack the palace. The scope of the attack proves more than the Ninja were prepared for as the Sons of Garmadon detonate a series of subterranean bombs, bringing down part of the palace. Lloyd and Harumi escape onto the flying ship, DESTINY'S BOUNTY. But the victory is a pyrrhic one. The second Oni Mask has been stolen and Harumi's parents and Master Hutchins are feared lost.

programme.title: The Pranks
programme.desc: The friends are using their talents to pull a prank on Olivia. But who gets the last laugh?Stephanie finds the perfect front page story for the school paper! It's almost too good to be true. Emma and Andrea go undercover to solve the mystery of the two Jacobs.

programme.title: Girls on Mission
programme.desc: Things are getting mixed up on Andrea's first day on the job at Heartlake City Juicebar.Mia and Stephanie have to use a little horse power at the Sunshine Ranch.Andrea relaxes at the beach while Emma is hard at work at her lifeguard tower.Olivia tapes a science show, with a little help from Mia's lemonade stand - and special effects!Emma and Stephanie accidentally rent a scary movie and suddenly there are beasts everywhere...Stephanie has to face her fears when the class gets an 'Animal Kingdom & 'school assignment.'

programme.title: The Hands Of Time
programme.desc: Master Wu mistakenly tries to single-handedly complete a battle he began decades ago against Acronix, one of the twin Hands of Time. But the arrival of the first Time Blade – a weapon with the power to speed up time – sends the Ninja to the Monastery just in time to rescue their master from certain doom.

But with Wu out of action and suffering from the effects of the Time Punch, the Ninja discover a new enemy in their midst: The Vermillion Warriors. And the Ninjas have no idea who controls them...

Meanwhile, as the Vermillion Warriors go on a kidnapping spree, Lloyd struggles with his role as master-in-training and Nya does her best to reboot Zane, who was knocked off line in his first battle with the Vermillion.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: The Aerialbots are thrown back in time to Cybertron's Golden Age.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Megatron becomes infected with cosmic rust, a metal-consuming plague.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Megatron has created an electromagnetic life-form. Although tiny and cute, he is also deadly and dangerous.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: After a failed attempt on Megatron's life, Starscream is banished to a deserted island.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Sari has to defend the Autobot home base from invading Constructicons.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Megatron comes up with a plan to build a space bridge to Cybertron.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: The Autobots battle against the Decepticons in a fate to save both Earth and Cybertron.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Sari Sumdac is coping with the newly discovered fact that she's a robot.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Things quickly descend from bad to worse for the Autobots when Detroit is menaced by new threats.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: The Autobots learn of the Omega Keys and the incredible secret they hold.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: The race for the Omega Keys grows more desperate.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: When the Decepticons take him captive, Smokescreen learns of the location of thefinal Omega Key.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Starscream proposes a truce to Megatron, but Dreadwing threatens to stand in the way of his return.

programme.title: Transformers

programme.title: Transformers

programme.title: The Mr Smurf Contest
programme.desc: When Papa decides to throw a Harvest Moon ball, all the male Smurfs compete in a "Mr Smurf" contest for the honor of escorting Sassette. Gargamel sneaks into the contest after shrinking himself with blue dye, in the hope of capturing all the Smurfs when he returns to normal size. The Smurfs kick him out and Sassette lets Papa escort her.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Kow-Tow, We Won't Bow: Smurfette leads the Smurflings on a nature hike, but Puppy gets too far ahead and they chase him into the land of the Wartmongers. King Bullrush captures them in bubbles and imprisons them. A group of rebels rescue the Smurflings and they escape on the back of Puppy.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Sideshow Smurfs: Clumsy and Smurfette are captured by the wicked Bombast, who plans to exhibit them in his sideshow. Papa Smurf hurries to their rescue and using the bungling Gargamel for interference is able to rescue his Smurfs.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - The Blue Plague: Brainy Smurf has decided to dedicate himself to the wellbeing of his fellow Smurfs. He is going to cure them of all ills… With a little help from the evil Gargamel!

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Papa's Flying Bed: Gargamel casts a spell on Papa's new bed so anyone who sleeps in it is transported to the location of his dream. The drowsy Smurfs' fantasies lead them to a private ship, a castle and finally to Gargamel's. They escape when Clumsy falls asleep and dreams of home.

programme.title: The Gallant Smurf
programme.desc: Queen Felicity will not let her son, Prince Godfrey, marry his sweetheart Pricilla. What she wants as a daughter-in-law is a girl who shows her something she's never seen before. When Hogatha learns of this, and also discovers the existence of Grandpa Smurf, she feels confident that she can surprise the Queen with her capture. Of course, Hogatha must first capture Grandpa Smurf...

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Petrified Smurfs: Brainy Smurf's done it again. This time, in front of Papa Smurf, too. He has recited a spell that changes everything to stone. Everything including himself and all the Smurfs and the Village, and the forest around for miles... Fortunately, Peewit appears....

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Smurfette For A Day: Hefty dresses like Smurfette to lure an enamored gnome, Piltkin, away from the Smurf Village. They burrow underground and meet a female gnome who falls in love with Piltkin who then casts Smurfette aside for his new heartthrob.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Marco Smurf And The Pepper Pirates: The Smurfs sail off in their sailing boat to save Marco Smurf, who has been captured at sea by Captain Pepper. Marina and a dolphin help to free Marco.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - The Littlest Giant: Simon is lost in the forest and in search of his parents. Simon is the son of a couple of giants. The Smurfs try to bring him home, but then Gargamel interrupts the party.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Tis The Season To Be Smurfy: This is Wild Smurf's first Christmas, and he's impressed by the decorations in the Village of the Smurfs. But Grandpa and Sassette are going to teach him the real meaning of Christmas when they help an old couple to live the most beautiful Christmas they've ever seen...

programme.title: Harmony Steals The Show
programme.desc: Harmony unwittingly signs a contract with Ghost Writer for a symphony that imprisons him in a ghostly nightclub for life! Papa Smurf demands a jury trial with ghostly jurors and a judge that finds Harmony innocent and Ghost Writer guilty of plagiarism.

programme.title: The Smurfs' Firebrigade
programme.desc: The Smurf village institutes a fire brigade to battle the flames in Greedy's kitchen only to discover that Gargamel has taken all of their water. Not realizing the weakness of his dam, Gargamel and Azrael are washed away when it breaks and floods the Smurf village, extinguishing the fire.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Born Rotten: As the Smurfs prepare for the Festival of the Stars, Gargamel plants a creature in their midst that smells so rotten that he can easily be traced to the Smurf village. Papa Smurf realizes that Born Rotten is from another planet, and he instructs Feathers to return him to his home before Gargamel finds them.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - A Hug For Grouchy: Grouchy learns that emotions can be great, particularly after the villainess of Chlorhydris creates a heart of ice to magically drain every one of care and love.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Jokey's Funny Bone: Jealous of the attention Vanity Smurf receives when he breaks his toe, Jokey Smurf feigns sickness in hopes of getting recognition. Unfortunately, his ploy turns against him and instead of loving care all he receives is the proverbial pound of curse.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - The Sand Witch: A swamp monster kidnaps Baby as a gift for a witch. The witch, who thinks no one loves her, is amazed when Baby shows affection. When Papa comes to rescue Baby, he makes the witch understand that the loyal swamp monster has always loved her.

programme.title: The Magic Earrings
programme.desc: Hogatha manages to obtain the magic golden earrings of Sonoria that will enable her to hear Smurfy voices from afar. Following Lazy's snores, she almost reaches the Smurf Village until Harmony's horn-blasts blow in her earrings and she flies home in a rage.

programme.title: The Smurfs And The Money Tree
programme.desc: The wicked wizard Gargamel has come up with yet another diabolical plan with the help of his mother, who isn't much nicer than him. He wants to tempt the Smurfs with money of which they have no notion. Will Greedy take the bait?

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Smurfs At Sea: Papa Smurf recalls Dreamy's exciting voyage on the high seas and his gripping adventures with sea turtles, whales, desert islands... and pirates!

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies line up to say 'Eh-oh' and then watch Matthew and Mark feed a baby calf. The Teletubbies play a game to see who can eat their Tubby Custard the slowest, but Po can't wait and eats her Tubby Custard very fast.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: A group of children sing some Christmas carols to the Teletubbies. Tinky Winky opens his present to find a beautiful star inside. The Teletubbies follow it all over Teletubbyland, but where will is end up?

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: Tinky Winky says "Eh-oh". The Teletubbies and some children watch Tamzin Griffin pretend to be the Funny Lady and tell the story of the naughty hat. The Teletubbies are very happy when they find their favourite things to play with.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Tubbies watch a little boy peel and mash some eggs for an egg mayonnaise sandwich. The Teletubbies laugh when they make a tune whilst eating their Tubby Custard.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies dance an up and down dance. They watch some children painting pictures and patterns on to eggs. In Teletubbyland, Laa-Laa dances with her ball until the magical tree appears.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: A voice trumpet rises and teaches the Teletubbies a nursery rhyme. Then they watch Becky go for a ride on a Tram. Po rides her scooter too fast and knocks the other Tubbies over.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies love playing on the slide. They stop to watch Andy Brown and some children digging in the sand for crabs.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies are asleep when a voice trumpet appears singing the rhyme 'Frére Jacques'. The Teletubbies laugh and call "Again, again!"

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: It's time for the Teletubbies to do their exercises. A voice trumpet rises and the Teletubbies stretch up and down to it's instructions.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: Laa-Laa dances with her ball. A little boy tells us why he likes to live in his block of flats. A balloon appears in Teletubbyland. The Teletubbies follow a balloon.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies watch Matthew and James help their uncle milk the cows. In Teletubbyland, the Tubby Custard machine isn't working, so they sing a special 'Tubby Custard' song. Then, the Tubby Custard machine works again.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies watch some children making Christmas cards. Laa-Laa's present is some lovely decorations. When Noo-Noo tidies them up they tickle his throat, so he throws them out to decorate Home Hill.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies and some children watch Tamzin Griffin pretend to be Funny Lady and tell the story of the Naughty Pig. Dipsy's hat keeps blowing away and he has to chase it all over Teletubbyland.

programme.desc: The well Titanic The brambles The plater lift The Buoy The chairlift The circus Nuts is an obsessed, clumsy blue squirrel. He lives with other animals in a crazy, lively, funny and sometimes absurd world. Wherever he goes, he causes disasters…

programme.title: IncrediTales
programme.desc: Sleeping Beauty, Little Mermaid and Snow White go to see a scary movie and decide to make popcorn. Snow White makes the first round. Then it's Little Mermaid's turn and finally Sleeping Beauty. But Sleeping Beauty falls asleep...

programme.title: Ladybug
programme.desc: Uplifting and moving family fun! Courageous seven-spotted ladybug Rube escapes his laboratory home and scales new heights on a quest for the legendary bug utopia Golden Canyon, with the help of worldly dragonfly Master Water. However, on arriving at Golden Canyon, he is dismayed to find it's a construction site! Rube and his new friends must band together to re-build their magical homeland. A heart-warming, magical tale of courage, hope and friendship.

programme.title: Mr. Magorium's Wonder Emporium
programme.desc: Mr. Magorium's Wonder Emporium is the strangest, most fantastic, most wonderful toy shop in the world. In fact, it's a magic toy shop and everything in it comes to life, including the shop itself. The Emporium asks only one thing of its customers you must believe it to see it. When Mr. Magorium, announces that he will be handing over his wonder-expanding shop to Molly Mahoney the shop decides to throw an unusual tantrum and all the once sparkling, colourful toys turn grey and quiet. Only Mahoney with the help of 9 year old Eric and sceptical accountant Henry can help save them, if they can find the source of magic inside themselves.

programme.title: Monkey Up
programme.desc: MONTY is an actor, a spokesperson, a diva, and…. a talking Capuchin Monkey! He's the face of the popular energy drink, ‘Monkey Up,' but believes he's way too good for just ‘commercials,' rather destined to be the first Oscar winning monkey movie star, that is until he meets the Andrews' family and learns the ultimate lesson, fame and fortune come and go, but family is forever.

programme.desc: An old lady distracts a Rabbid, and he accidentally shuts himself inside a supermarket freezer.

programme.title: Rabbids are in the wild.
programme.desc: Hibernation Rabbid gives a Rabbid butler a old pictures of himself, frozen inside an ice cube.

programme.title: The Rabbids turn the city upside down.
programme.desc: The Rabbids get their hands on a remote-controlled car, and figure out how to use the controller.

programme.title: The Rabbids take off.
programme.desc: The rabbids unintentionally help Zak and his childhood crush Zoey develop a romance…

programme.title: The Rabbids in Santa's country.
programme.desc: When Gina & John get out of power in their polar station, they create a new way to produce electricity.

programme.title: Fishtronaut
programme.desc: The series tells the story of Fishtronaut, a fish in a spacesuit, similar to reverse scuba gear, which allows him to fly and breathe out of water.

programme.title: Om Nom Stories
programme.desc: Sweet tooth Om Nom is wandering Around the world, eats a lot of candies and tries to find his Dream job. Watch his adventures and solve different puzzles on the way!

programme.title: Pumpkin Reports
programme.desc: Max Green's new brother and sister are aliens sent to Earth as the advance party for an invasion - and he's the only one who can stop them turning humans into unwilling slave-gardeners.

programme.title: Sunny Bunnies
programme.desc: The Sunny Bunnies are five fluffy balls of light named Turbo, Big Boo, Shiny, Iris and Hopper who can appear anywhere there is light. The Bunnies always bring joy and happiness, beaming down to explore new and exciting locations, finding fun and mischievous games to enjoy.

programme.title: Angry Birds Toons
programme.desc: Check out Angry Birds Toons compilations! Each compilation has several episodes from your favorite shows including Angry Birds, Piggy Tales, and Stella!

programme.title: Grojband
programme.desc: The story about 12 year old Corey that emotionally torments his sister so that she will write the ultimate lyrics for his garage band.

programme.title: Gummy Bear and Friends
programme.desc: Gummy lives in an apartment with his friend Harry the Chameleon, while his other friend Kala the Cat hangs out in a ninja dojo on the roof. Together they go on wild and wacky adventures in their building and hometown. Enjoy the fun and crazy adventures!

programme.title: The Secrets of Honey Hills
programme.desc: Honey Hills is a small seaside town where all kind of animals live. It's a good neighbourhood. However, mysterious and inexplicable events sometimes cause misunderstandings among neighbours. Then, genius detective Sophie the Owl together with her young assistant Chirp the Squirrel take up the investigation.

programme.title: Back to Back
programme.desc: Embark on an electrifying journey as they boldly leap from one heart-pounding expedition to the next, fueled by their unbreakable bond and insatiable thirst for excitement. Get ready to be swept away in a whirlwind of adrenaline-pumping quests, where danger and discovery await them at every turn.

programme.title: Princess Play Time
programme.desc: The proud Princess likes to do things her own way, but her antics are always joined by her restless brother, Prince, who tends to turn everything topsy-turvy. Any playtime in their room transforms into a fantastic journey through unusual worlds: the children arrange a picnic on the Moon, conduct a detective investigation in a toy city, or search for pirate treasures on islands! Although initially, the Princess and Prince seem to clash and compete, by the end, they always find joy in each other's company and that of their cherished dog, Bona.

programme.title: Shaun the Sheep
programme.desc: It's countryside chaos as Shaun The Sheep returns to the small screen with his very own series. Peace in the valley turns to mayhem in the meadow as Shaun leads his flock into all sorts of scrapes and scraps, running rings around sheepdog Bitzer when the Farmer's back is turned.

programme.title: The Adventures of Peter and Wolf

The characters will have to solve locals' problems and regularly save the world.

programme.title: Lego DREAMZzz
programme.desc: Logan's desperation to prove himself leads to his capture by the Nightmare King, which leaves his friends to face the Sheep Week finals alone.

programme.title: Lego DREAMZzz
programme.desc: The Dream Chasers rush to save Logan from the Shadowkeep's dungeon, but the liberators soon become the prisoners in a nightmarish twist of fate.

programme.title: Lego DREAMZzz
programme.desc: A wave of nightmares washes over the school, causing Coach Jeffries to mandate students reveal their dreams to him for interpretation. programme.title: Lego DREAMZzz
programme.desc: With Albert captured by the Night Hunter and Z-Blob detained by Agent Strick, it's time for a dual rescue in the Waking World and the Dream World!

programme.title: Lego City Adventures
programme.desc: The oblivious Ms. Blumfeld is turned into a superhero, stopping crimes around the city, as Duke struggles with his orders to arrest her.

programme.title: Lego City Adventures
programme.desc: It's Harl Hubbs Day and Harl sees the party as an opportunity to help the whole city. Harl quickly discovers he wasn't prepared for Harl mania!

programme.title: Lego City Adventures
programme.desc: Billy's mother, Ann, surprises everyone when she accepts a junkyard race challenge against the city's notorious street racing legend, Tread Octane.

programme.title: Lego City Adventures
programme.desc: We pull back the curtain to see how Firemen Bob and Clemmons retrieve bizarre request items for Chief Freya during a typical emergency.

programme.title: Lego City Adventures
programme.desc: It's an old west showdown, when a new adversary rolls into town, it tests the city for both criminals and authorities alike.

programme.title: Lego City Adventures
programme.desc: Fendrich organizes a Police and Fireman charity as a distraction while he attempts to steal the city deed. Sinclair gathers antiheroes to stop him.

programme.title: Lego City Adventures
programme.desc: Freya is one credit short of graduating from the fire academy and is suspended as Fire Chief until she completes the course.

programme.title: Lego City Adventures
programme.desc: Mayor Fleck is running for re-election against R E Fendrich who will stop at nothing to win to use his new power to defeat Sinclair once and for all.

programme.title: Lego City Adventures
programme.desc: When Duke loses his memory in an accident, Snake Rattler tricks him into believing he is Snake's criminal henchman.

programme.title: Lego City Adventures
programme.desc: When Rooky discovers it's Chief Wheeler's birthday, she is determined to make it a memorable one despite his reluctance to make a big deal about it.

programme.title: Lego City Adventures
programme.desc: When the mythical ocean monster, the Quacken, is sighted off the coast, famed adventurer Jessica Sharpe vows to capture it.

programme.title: Lego City Adventures
programme.desc: Rooky and Grizzled go undercover aboard the Guardian of the Oceans in search of a lost pirate treasure.

programme.title: Lego City Adventures
programme.desc: During the dedication ceremony of the city's deep sea vessel to honour Duke, Freya and Harl, the ship is accidentally set adrift.

programme.title: Lego City Adventures
programme.desc: When Fendrich threatens to ruin Sinclair's Holiday Gala, Duke intervenes to save both the party and the holidays!

programme.title: Lego City Adventures
programme.desc: Freya takes Billy and Mark on a ride along, but when things get out of hand, it's up to Mark to save the day.

programme.title: Lego City Adventures
programme.desc: Fendrich and his gang learn of Cluster's hidden junkyard treasure, but Harl Cluster, Shirley and Tread unite to protect it.

programme.title: Lego City Adventures
programme.desc: Snake and Daisy take advantage of Tread's competitive nature to get him to unknowingly act as their getaway driver to pull off a heist.

programme.title: Lego City Adventures
programme.desc: It's a mad dash by Buster to retrieve his runaway mustache in this fast paced, zany citywide chase.

programme.title: Lego City Adventures
programme.desc: Grizzled and Rooky go undercover to root out the criminal mastermind behind a counterfeit pie operation.

programme.title: Beyblade G Revolution E17
programme.desc: The BBA Revolution are slated to face the sneaky Barthez Battalion, but while Hilary and Kenny want to report their dirty deeds to the authorities, Tyson believes the best way to teach them a lesson is to beat them fair and square...But that's before he really sees how low the team will sink to win.

programme.title: Beyblade G Revolution E18
programme.desc: Our heroes land in Egypt for the next leg of the tournament where the first two teams going up against each other are the Blitzkrieg Boys against the Barthez Battalion. But as Barthez readies his team, we learn he's devised a special spider web-like tape that is supposed to shoot out of his team's blades and trap their opponents in an inescapable web.

programme.title: Beyblade G Revolution E19
programme.desc: Max is having trouble convincing Rick that he is truly dedicated to the PPB All Starz. Max just wants to play for love of the game but Rick thinks he should do anything to win. When the competition continues Max demands they fight a "pairs" match so that he and Rick are forced to work as a team.

programme.title: Beyblade G Revolution E1
programme.desc: Tyson has just returned back from the World Championships with another victory and he's decided to teach a class of boys in the neighborhood the fine art of blading.

programme.title: Beyblade G Revolution E2
programme.desc: Tyson has his hands full when he's confronted by a tough little Blader named Daichi. Just as they're about to battle another mysterious Blader named Jin shows up and wants to challenge Tyson as well. All three Bladers mix it up but Ray puts a stop to the fight when he realizes that Tyson can't handle two Bladers at once.

programme.title: Beyblade G Revolution E3
programme.desc: Daichi continues to annoy Tyson with his constant battle challenges, which Tyson refuses to give in to - even after an embarrassing confrontation at the public swimming pool proves that Daichi is an impressive and highly skilled Beyblader.

programme.title: Beyblade G Revolution E4
programme.desc: Tyson's alone and picking up the pieces of what used to be The Bladebreakers... Daichi won't leave him alone, and Kai is...well, Kai...at least he's got the championships to look forward too, right? Meanwhile, both Ray and Max are going through the growing pains of being part of a new team.

programme.title: Beyblade G Revolution E5
programme.desc: At the preliminaries for the World Championships, Daichi wins his matches easily, establishing himself as a new powerhouse on the Beyblading scene. Kenny also competes, defeating his opponents with such skill that even Tyson is impressed.

programme.title: Beyblade G Revolution E6
programme.desc: There's only one round left in the tournament to decide who's going to partner up with Tyson in the World Beyblade Tag Team Championships and it's between Daichi and Kai.

programme.title: Beyblade G Revolution E7
programme.desc: The Block A and Block B finals of the Beyblade World Championships are underway. Max wins his match and finds himself partnered with a real bully of a blader named Rick.

programme.title: Beyblade G Revolution E8
programme.desc: The BBA Revolution Team heads to a remote training camp to prepare for the upcoming tournament. When they first arrive, Hiro tells Tyson that Kai has quit the team.

programme.title: Beyblade G Revolution E9
programme.desc: The BBA Revolution team fly to New York City for the Beyblade World Championships. The normally feisty Daichi proves to be afraid of flying, and once in the city, he becomes overwhelmed by the size and scope of things in the Big Apple.

programme.title: Beyblade G Revolution E10
programme.desc: The teams have been selected and the finals are about to begin...Unfortunately Tyson finds himself facing all of his former friends...each part of a team that he will eventually have to 'blade against.

programme.title: Beyblade G Revolution E11
programme.desc: Tyson blames his embarrassing loss to Ray on Daichi, telling the team he's better off competing alone. As Tyson runs away, the US Finals continue with Rick of the PPB All Starz against Claude of Barthez Battalion.

programme.title: Beyblade G Revolution E12
programme.desc: The Beyblade World Tag Team Championships are about to start in Rome as Barthez busily prepares his team for the big event. He's even invited a television news crew to document his efforts as a coach.

programme.title: Beyblade G Revolution E13
programme.desc: Tyson gets in a huff and leaves the team after he is dropped from the lineup against the Blitzkrieg Boys. This leaves Kenny and Daichi to pick up the slack against their opponents.

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: Dennis and his pet dog, Gnasher, live by just one rule: Kids should make all the rules!

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: The adventures of Dennis, his dog Gnasher, and their best friends JJ, Rubi and Pieface. The team cause havoc to Walter, Beanotown and Bash Street School, where all the rules go out the window.

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: Walter shows off some new tricks on his fancy skateboard, prompting Dennis to make a jibe that even his Gran could do tricks like that with such a high-tech boar and the bet is on! However, Walter secretly sabotages the trick, causing Gran to hang up her menacing shoes as a matter of public safety. It's up to Dennis, Gnasher and Angel Face to expose the truth and get Gran back to her wily self. Followed by more Dennis episodes.

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: Dennis and his pet dog, Gnasher, live by just one rule: Kids should make all the rules!

programme.title: When I Was Your Age
programme.desc: Paul, 10, is a typical little boy. Except that as soon as someone tells him When I was your age, he is immediately hurled back to the time when the person he is talking to was 10 too.

programme.title: The Amazing Spiez: The Amazing Spiez
programme.desc: Megan is teased by her brothers because she is a poor skateboarder. Then they are called for a mission to investigate strange occurrences in Dubai, involving buildings and other structures breaking down. Later, Megan goes missing after getting her new skateboard that she will use to show her brothers that she can skate. Lee, Marc and Tony find her with an army of skateboarders responsible for breaking down the buildings so they can create skateparks for themselves.

programme.title: The Amazing Spiez: The Amazing Spiez
programme.desc: The Spiez are sent to protect a famous TV spy actor from various incidents. To keep an eye on him, the Spiez are invited to be in his Spy show, with the guidance of their parents who think they won a contest. The actor is kidnapped and the Spiez rescue him.

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: After Dennis breaks his bike, Dad is unable to afford a new one, so Dennis convinces him to ask his boss for a raise. Unfortunately, Mr Scrimp reduces his wages instead. Dennis then trashes his house to convince Scrimp that his family are poor, so that Mr Scrimp will feel compelled to raise Dad's wages. Just as Scrimp has been taken in by Dennis' plan, Mum and Dad arrive home laden with shopping bags, resulting in Dad getting fired on the spot. Dennis resolves to get Dad his old job back by secretly causing chaos at his office. To restore order Scrimp rehires Dad, sealing the deal with a generous pay rise. Mum and Dad repair the house, but still don't have enough money to buy Dennis a new bike, instead it gets repaired with Dad's office rubber bands and paperclips. Followed by 60 Second Dennis and 'Dennis Hiccups'.

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: Believing Gnasher and Gnipper to be trapped in Beanotown Dog Pound, Dennis comes up with a plan to rescue his friends and bring them both home. Followed by more Dennis and Gnasher episodes.

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: When Dennis breaks his skateboard again, Dad agrees to buy Dennis the best skateboard there is as a replacement if he is able to win a prize at the upcoming school award ceremony. Followed by 60 Second Dennis and 'Dance of the Seven Pies'

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: Dennis tries to get a birthday present by saying thank you to his relatives. However, because of Dennis' naughty personality, they take his attempts in a negative way. Followed by 'Dennis Hiccups'

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: To get his friends back from Walter's group, Dennis challenges Walter to a videogames battle. Followed by 60 Second Dennis and 'Masters of the House'.

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: After a wrestling accident, Gnasher swallows a canister of laughing gas at the vet's. Dennis, along with Gnasher hide in the conference centre, where dad gives a speech. However, the canister leaks, causing Gnasher to fart laughing gas and having everyone laughing. Followed by 'Attack of the Walterbot'

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: Dennis and Co. have to control Pie Face's obsession with pies during the Pie Festival. Otherwise, they will be grounded. Followed by 'Great Outdoors'

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: On a school trip, Dennis finds out that he is descentant to a warrior tribe. He also discovers that Montanna Smith (a famous Indiana Jones-esque explorer and one of Walter's personal heroes) is actually a thief who's trying to steal the treasure of Dennis' ancestor. Will he be stopped before he gets his hands on the treasure? Followed by Dog Tired.

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: Mum has bought curtain material for the soon to be newly decorated kitchen, and asks Dad to look after it while she is out. However, Dad falls asleep and mistakenly agrees that Dennis can use it as a giant sail. When Dad realises that it has gone, he calls Dennis to bring it back, but unfortunately Dennis gets into a spot of bother with the colonel, who takes the curtain material off Dennis. In an attempt to steal it back, the garden being wrecked and the kitchen is left looking like a bombsite. Dennis, Gnasher and Dad have to clean up the whole kitchen and redecorate it in time for Mum returning. When Mum decides it is time to hang the new curtains, Dennis is about to get the curtain material, but Mum reveals that she has changed her mind and bought new curtains instead. Followed by 'Fangs for the Memories'

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: Dennis, his friends and Walter's friends get marooned on a desert island when Dennis attempts to escape a boring field trip. Followed by Substitute Creecher

programme.desc: Gnasher and Gnipper enter a dog show, regardless of Walter saying they don't have true talent. He wants Athena and Miss Mini Wuff to win, but Walter has just underestimated Gnasher's true capabilities. Followed by Grounded.

programme.desc: The girls convince Kendall to help them build a snow playhouse for the animals by promising they'll work fast to beat an incoming storm. Sure enough, they get distracted, and the only way to salvage their fort is to make good on their broken promise.

programme.desc: A journey of conquest begins as Michael, Matthew and Trevor jump into Mario Kart 8 Deluxe. / It is quickly revealed who is best at Mario Kart 8 Deluxe. / Michael tries out the previous DLC character, the villager from Animal Crossing. programme.desc: Bernie gets his shell dirty, and when he takes it off to clean it, someone swipes it! Bernie starts investigating, and when George's shell goes missing too, they join forces to find the thief...

programme.title: The Chocolix: The Picnic Day / Melody of the Heart / Fun with Responsibility – 1
programme.desc: Chocomark and Chocolyne are super excited because the Chocolix family will go out on a picnic. However, when their parents call them, they realize the kids have not cleaned up their rooms as they had promised. Both kids try to give some excuses, but Mrs White insists, saying that they will only go on the picnic if they clean their rooms. With no alternative and without the slightest desire to clean up all that mess, the two kids create a thousand plans to escape from the chore.Message: Be responsible. Duty comes before fun. / Truffle can hardly wait for his mascot to arrive. He walks back and forth waiting for the 2-year-old dog they have adopted. As soon as it gets there, Truffle takes him to Chocoland park to play with the other mascots, Sweet-cookie and Fluffy, who were at home waiting for their new friend. At the park, they met a new little friend who seemed to be lost. Soon, all the club friends learn about this and have an idea for finding the dog's owner. This makes Max unhappy because he had fallen in love with him.Message: We should never keep anything that does not belong to us before looking for the true owner. / Chocoland school is organizing its yearly field trip and through a poll the students will be able to choose the place they want to go to: The Blue Lake or The Enchanted Mountain. Chocomark, Chocolyne and their friends want to go to The Blue Lake. But for this, they will have to compete with the group that wants to go to The Enchanted Mountain. For the votes to be valid, the children need to hand in an essay about one responsibility each one has at home. The problem is that not everyone knows what they will talk about. And now, who will win?
