programme.title: Girl Asleep
programme.desc: The world is closing in on Greta Driscoll. On the cusp of turning fifteen she can't bear to leave her childhood, it contains all the things that give her comfort in this incomprehensible new world. She floats in a bubble of loserdom with her only friend Elliott, until her parents throw her a surprise 15th birthday party and she's flung into a parallel place a world that's weirdly erotic, a little bit violent and thoroughly ludicrous - only there can she find herself. Based on the critically acclaimed production by Windmill Theatre, GIRL ASLEEP is a journey into the absurd, scary and beautiful heart of the teenage mind.

programme.title: The Cobbler
programme.desc: Max Simkin repairs shoes in the same New York shop that has been in his family for generations. Disenchanted with the grind of daily life, Max stumbles upon a magical heirloom that allows him to step into the lives of his customers and see the world in a new way. Sometimes walking in another man's shoes is the only way one can discover who they really are.

programme.title: Big Mommas: Like Father, Like Son
programme.desc: Big Momma is back — and this time he has big backup: his teenage stepson Trent (Brendan T. Jackson). Martin Lawrence returns as FBI agent Malcolm Turner and as Turner's deep-cover alter-ego Big Momma. Turner is joined by Trent, as they go undercover at an all-girls performing arts school after Trent witnesses a murder. Posing as Big Momma and as hefty coed Charmaine, they must find the murderer before he finds them.

programme.title: Relic Hunter

programme.title: Hope's Legacy
programme.desc: Sometimes hope is all you need, but sometimes it can be hard to find. Faced with the death of her beloved grandmother, Lizzy now focuses on the farm, her horses, and three-day eventing. With her upcoming marriage to James threatened and challenged by a beautiful girl from his past, Lizzy must learn to stand on her own two feet but with Legacy by her side she can do it. It's a competitive world but she's determined to make it work. Lizzy will need to conquer her bullies and overcome three competitions: show jumping, cross country, and dressage with her young horse, Legacy. Her manager is by her side all the way but her past catches up with her, and Lizzy needs to make a choice to stop it all or go for the gold.

programme.title: Hope Ranch (aka Riding Faith)
programme.desc: With the impending foreclose of the family Ranch, Rebecca struggles with her rebellious daughter Grace who is still not over the death of her father Mike.

programme.title: Sox: A Family's Best Friend
programme.desc: A new family is having difficulty adjusting, when an adorable dog comes into their life. Once his special powers are discovered, the local dog catcher and the (F.B.D.I) Federal Bureau of Dog Investigation will stop at nothing to get him.

programme.title: Fire
programme.desc: Sita (Nandita Das) and Radha (Shabana Azmi) are two Indian women stuck in loveless marriages. While Sita is trapped in an arranged relationship with her cruel and unfaithful husband, Jatin (Jaaved Jaafei), Radha is married to his brother, Ashok (Kulbhushan Kharbanda), a religious zealot who believes in suppressing desire. As the two women recognize their similar situations, they grow closer, and t

programme.title: A Love To Remember
programme.desc: Tenley, a horticulturist, works up the courage to meet her online crush, Jared. Tenley gets mistaken for Jared's wife and is forced to keep the lie up with Jared's family and his charming best friend, Everett, in order to save their company.

programme.title: Love In Aruba
programme.desc: A lonely teacher (Amber) is hired by Connor, the single father of a struggling student. She is to tutor his daughter Macey (age 10) over a summer while they travel for his work. As Amber helps Macey, she sees glimpses of what's missing in the family's life. Their grand destinations are filled with rich items and potential rewarding business deals, but it's missing heart. Amber's influence fills the void and brings Macey and Connor together. With it, Amber starts to fall in love with Connor, but can he see her as anything beyond the hired help?

programme.title: Love Switch
programme.desc: On their 13th wedding anniversary, James and Michelle wake up to discover they have somehow switched bodies. Unable to switch back, they are forced to understand what the other goes through daily.

programme.title: Surviving Love
programme.desc: Jessica Miller is thrust into the "real" world when she graduates from college. To conquer this new world, she must discover her faith, open a box of memories and learn the simple secrets of life only a mother can share.

programme.title: Love's Second Chance
programme.desc: Passionate fashion stylist Rose is in her 30s and living in New York. When she inherits her grandmother's vintage dress shop, she returns to her small hometown to take care of the store and bumps into her high school crush Cole.

programme.title: Bonanza Compilation Episodes 19, 20, 21
programme.desc: The Wild West adventures of Ben Cartwright and his sons as they run and defend their Nevada ranch while helping the surrounding community.

programme.title: Gunfight at Red Sands
programme.desc: An avenging outsider riddles a gang of ruthless bandits in revenge for the murder of his family.

programme.title: Abilene Town
programme.desc: Colorized American Western Movie from 1946 starring Randolph Scott: Abilene Town - A sheriff tries to stop homesteader conflicts in the West after the Civil War.

programme.title: Django the Last Killer
programme.desc: Ramon's parents are killed by men of landowner John Barrett. While trying to get revenge, Ramon is wounded but has saved the life of Rezza, an old disillusioned killer.

programme.title: Time for me to Come Home for Christmas
programme.desc: Cara faces a bittersweet Christmas since her mother's passing. Flying to Oklahoma, she meets country singer Heath, facing a tough holiday too since his father's death.

programme.title: The Dating List
programme.desc: Abby Morel is a bright, young editor's assistant living in the big city. Wanting to get ahead in her career, she makes an unusual deal with her high-flying boss, Susan. Susan is far too busy to date, but she wants to fall in love.

programme.title: A Song for Christmas
programme.desc: Two single parents stumble into the possibility of love for Christmas, only to discover that their daughters are embroiled in a rivalry at school. When the rivalry gets out of control, can hope and healing lead everyone to a peaceful and merry Christmas?

programme.title: Christmas Wedding
programme.desc: A month before their wedding, on Christmas Day, Emily is called away for business. When Emily is due to return, a major storm hits making it impossible for her to leave. Emily desperately tries to make it home while Ben gets his act together.

programme.title: Starting Up Love
programme.desc: Jillian inherits a beautiful mountainside cabin after her long-lost, wealthy uncle dies. She plans to sell it, but handsome caretaker Liam makes her an offer she can't refuse, and sparks fly as they work to transform the cabin into a holiday resort.

programme.title: Wild Horses
programme.desc: An over-the-hill rodeo champion gets fired from his assembly line job in Texas. He and a buddy then decide to head to Wyoming to get a job herding mustangs. His wife gives him her blessing, knowing he needs to find something which satisfies his spirit.

programme.title: Instakiller
programme.desc: When teenager Harper becomes internet famous overnight, mom Layla's worried about the sudden attention – a fear that's justified when Harper is soon stalked online. Before too long the stalking has turned violent and Layla must face down the psychopath who is willing to kill her and her daughter.

programme.title: Killer In-Law
programme.desc: Inspired by true events...Melissa, a happily married woman with an eight-year-old daughter invites her husband's mother to live with them. However, Melissa comes to realize that Grandma is unhinged and wants to kidnap Melissa's daughter to replace her own dead child.

programme.title: Pele: Birth of a Legend
programme.desc: The amazing story of Pele's meteoric rise from the slums of Sao Paulo to World Cup victory.

programme.title: Burning Rubber
programme.desc: John Travolta stars in this action-packed, testosterone-fuelled thriller! When his son joins a rival racing team, a retired car racing legend returns to the dirt track, sparking more tension and brutal competition between the father and son duo. Co-stars Hollywood veteran Michael Madsen and global sensation Shania Twain. Sparks are set to fly in this gripping tale rooted in high-speed danger!

programme.title: Nazarin
programme.desc: A priest in a poor community lives a charitable life in accordance with his religious principles, but many others do not return the favor.

programme.title: Night of the Living Dead
programme.desc: A group of people hide from bloodthirsty zombies in a farmhouse.

programme.title: No One Can Brush My Hair Like The Wind
programme.desc: No One Can Brush My Hair Like the Wind, a film that portrays the lives of many lonely souls in a desperate search for company. The difficult relationship between a woman writer who lives in solitude and a young girl who comes bursting into her life.

programme.title: House Of The Stone Monkeys
programme.desc: The film is about two 10-year-old boys, who live in the same building but it is set in 1982, and the present day.

programme.title: October
programme.desc: In documentary style, events in Petrograd are re-enacted from the end of the monarchy in February of 1917 to the end of the provisional government and the decrees of peace and of land in November of that year. Lenin returns in April. In July, counter-revolutionaries put down a spontaneous revolt, and Lenin's arrest is ordered. By late October, the Bolsheviks are ready to strike: ten days will shake the world. While the Mensheviks vacillate, an advance guard infiltrates the palace. Anatov-Oveyenko leads the attack and signs the proclamation dissolving the provisional government.

programme.title: Wrongfully Accused
programme.desc: Ryan Harrison is framed for murder and must prove himself innocent by finding a mysterious one-eyed, one-armed, one-legged man after escaping from a bus accident on the way to jail.

programme.title: The Forger
programme.desc: A teenager wanders into Carmel, California, where he is soon introduced to the art-forgery community.

programme.title: Shes Funny That Way
programme.desc: A married Broadway director falls for a call-girl-turned-actress and works to help her advance her career, but things get a little more complicated than they bargained for.

programme.title: The Heist
programme.desc: A comedy centered on three museum security guards who devise a plan to steal back the artworks to which they have become attached after they are transferred to another museum. Starring: Morgan Freeman, Christopher Walken, Joseph McKenna, Wynn Everett

programme.title: Breaking Infinity
programme.desc: Breaking Infinity is a time-bending thriller about a research scientist named Liam, who has become unstuck in time. The only people Liam can count on for help are the doctor treating him, Emma, who's convinced he's suffering from delusions and his lab assistant Garret. As Liam's episodes become more intense, and his jumps through time more extreme, Liam travels from the distant past where he's guided by a mysterious Old Man, to the future where he witnesses the end of the world - an apocalypse he may have caused.

programme.title: Upside Down
programme.desc: Ever since Adam (Jim Sturgess) and Eden (Kirsten Dunst) fell in love as teens, their bond has faced astronomical odds. The pair are separated, not just by social class or the political system committed to keeping them apart, but also by a freak planetary condition: they live on twinned, parallel worlds with opposing gravitational forces. Years later, after suffering the pain of being torn apart, Adam decides to set out on a quest to once again find Eden and reconnect with his lost love.

programme.title: Legend
programme.desc: Tom Cruise stars in this visually stunning fantasy adventure, in which pure good and evil battle to the death amidst spectacular surroundings. Set in a timeless mythical forest inhabited by fairies, goblins, unicorns, and mortals, the fantastic story has Tom Cruise as a mystical forest dweller chosen by fate to undertake a heroic quest. He must save a beautiful princess (Mia Sara) and defeat the demonic Lord of Darkness (Tim Curry), or the world will be plunged into a never-ending ice age.

programme.title: Sum of Histories
programme.desc: Two physicists discover how to manipulate electrons with quantum tunneling to send emails to the past. With the power to influence the recent past, the temptation to right old wrongs is too great.

programme.title: The Arrival
programme.desc: Radio astronomer Zane Zaminsky (Charlie Sheen) believes he's picked up a cosmic noise that signals extraterrestrial intelligence. His desperate search for answers leads him to Mexico and a mysterious power plant, where is arrested for the murder of a scientist. Zane must escape with his proof of the world-shattering alien invasion in this intense sci-fi thriller.

programme.title: Eyewitness
programme.desc: It has been five years after Diana send a man to jail for the murder of her father and fiancee. Then he escapes from prison. He keeps her captive in her own home. Did Diana put an innocent man away?

programme.title: WWJD II The Woodcarver
programme.desc: A troubled youth vandalizes a church and winds up in a close association with the woodcarver whose work he destroyed.

programme.title: One Last Dance
programme.desc: In the wake of tragedy, a renowned NY dance company is on the brink of collapse. After leaving the dance world for good, Travis, Chrissa and Max have one last chance to re-connect with the passion and prove that miracles really can happen.

programme.title: It Had to be You
programme.desc: When her ad agency is absorbed by a much larger, more powerful firm, Darby's rivalry with new partner Derrick could blossom into something else.

programme.title: Freeheld
programme.desc: Diagnosed with terminal cancer, decorated New Jersey detective Laurel Hester (Julianne Moore) wishes to leave her pension benefits to domestic partner Stacie Andree (Elliot Page). Denied by local county officials, Laurel receives help from hard-nosed colleague Dane Wells (Michael Shannon) and activist Steven Goldstein (Steve Carell), who unite to rally fellow police officers and ordinary citizens to support the couple's fight for equality.

programme.title: Lez Bomb
programme.desc: Lez Bomb is a hilarious and sweet “coming out” comedy in the vein of Meet the Parents from Bobby Farrelly, producer of There's Something about Mary. Lauren, (Writer-Director Jenna Laurenzo) comes home with life changing news. As it turns out, there is no good time to drop the Lez Bomb.

programme.title: Romance Retreat
programme.desc: After a break-up, journalist Dana Willingham finds herself alone and stuck at a couple's yoga retreat while the biggest story of her career breaks far away. But when she meets handsome fellow retreater Stefan Gonzales who's lying low after being the center of a scandal, she smells a good story. As she gains his trust and the pair get closer, will she choose the perfect story or the perfect man?

programme.title: The Competition
programme.desc: Lauren Mauldin (Thora Birch) is a strong-willed but misguided young woman who encourages her millions of blog followers to apply her scientific formula to all romantic relationships in order to prevent heartache. If you follow her six-month PIG Theory, you will always have the upper hand and you will never be cheated on! Her plan works smoothly until her sister Gena introduces her to the charming and undefeated womens' advocate attorney, Calvin Chesney (Chris Klein). Calvin refuses to believe human connections can be so easily categorised. He challenges Lauren to a competition to prove her theory wrong.

programme.title: Love Me
programme.desc: A teen movie-geek falls for the new kid in town, who may be involved in the disappearance of another girl.

programme.title: The Legend Of Hercules
programme.desc: Banished by the king, Hercules harnesses his powers and gathers an army to fight his way back to his kingdom.

programme.title: Power Rangers
programme.desc: Five teenagers, infused with superhuman abilities, must harness their newfound powers to battle alien invaders

programme.title: Jane Got a Gun
programme.desc: A mother fights to defend her family from being massacred at the hands of a ruthless and violent gang.

programme.title: Love N' Dancing
programme.desc: Jessica (Amy Smart) had given up on her dream of a life of the stage, until she meets ex-dance champion Jake (Tom Malloy), who becomes her teacher when the couple make an instant connection. Together, they decide to risk it all when they enter the World Swing Championship to reclaim Jake's former title.

programme.title: Call of The Wild
programme.desc: Call of The Wild is a modern-day story incorporating elements of Jack London's classic short novel. Whilst Ryann (Ariel Gade) is staying with her Grandpa Bill (Christopher Lloyd) a wild hybrid wolf/dog shows up injured on the back porch one night. Ryann and a local friend believe they can train the magnificent animal to become a sled dog leader but first they must try and persuade Grandpa, who knows the animal will eventually have to return to the wild. Then they must stand up to the local bully who wants to claim the dog as his own.

programme.title: Me, Myself and Di
programme.desc: After winning the 'trip of a lifetime' to a caravan park in Rhyl, North Wales, unlucky in love Northerner, Janet Brown, is ready for a holiday romance. Unfortunately, following the advice of best friend Diana (Lucy Pinder) - that Janet should pretend to be the opposite of who she actually is in order to find love - doesn't quite lead to the happily ever after she was hoping for. A laugh-out-loud gritty rom-com with a huge ensemble cast including James Lance (Northern Soul, Bronson, Marie Antoinette, Bel Ami), Will Mellor (Two Pints of Lager and a Packet of Crisps, Line of Duty), Larry Lamb (EastEnders, The Hatton Garden Job), Marek Oravec (Captain America: The First Avenger), Wim Snape (The Full Monty, Coronation Street), and Katy Clayton (Casualty, Shameless).

programme.title: Love N' Dancing
programme.desc: Jessica (Amy Smart) had given up on her dream of a life of the stage, until she meets ex-dance champion Jake (Tom Malloy), who becomes her teacher when the couple make an instant connection. Together, they decide to risk it all when they enter the World Swing Championship to reclaim Jake's former title.

programme.title: Ghost World
programme.desc: Deliciously dry and quirky, Ghost World, based on the cult comic book, is like no other teen comedy you've seen before! Original and terrifically funny, Ghost World is a raw-edged comedy that follows Enid (Thora Birch - American Beauty) and Rebecca (Scarlett Johansson - The Horse Whisperer), two teenage girls who have always been too cool to bother with the losers in their high school. Embarrassing the local 'freaks' and laughing at all around, their friendship is founded on the mutual conviction that pretty much everything sucks!

programme.title: One Small Hitch
programme.desc: A heart-warming romantic comedy in which childhood friends Josh (Shane McCrae: The Help) and Molly (Aubrey Dollar: Failure to Launch) fake their marriage plans for the benefit of the groom's dying father. However, things get out of hand when they find themselves obliged to stage a phoney wedding. When the pretence gives way to real feelings, they have some serious decisions to make!

programme.title: The Day of the Triffids
programme.desc: An epic adaptation of John Wyndhams best-selling novel, which brings his terrifying creation of carnivorous plants to life in a CGI extravaganza. Starring Dougray Scott (Hitman), Joely Richardson (The Patriot), Brian Cox (Troy), Eddie Izzard (Valkyrie) and Vanessa Redgrave (Atonement). An electrifying thriller about mankinds deadliest adversary, a foe with an unquenchable taste for human flesh.

programme.title: Fear of Rain
programme.desc: An unsettling horror thriller starring Katherine Heigl (Knocked Up), Madison Iseman (Annabelle Comes Home) and Harry Connick Jr. (PS. I Love You). 17-year old Rain has early onset schizophrenia and after returning home from being hospitalised, meets hauntingly awkward Caleb. But she must suppress the manipulative forces consuming her mind and work out if her neighbour has kidnapped a little girl.

programme.title: The Dark Red
programme.desc: A seat-edge twisted shocker from acclaimed director Dan Bush (The Vault). Being held against her will in a psychiatric ward, mother Sybil claims that her new-born was kidnapped by a secret society to harvest its supernatural blood. She begs the doctors to let her go so she can rescue her baby from the cults dungeons. Is she telling the truth, or is it just mere delusion?

programme.title: Global Meltdown
programme.desc: After a cataclysmic event causes the Earth's crust to break apart, a helicopter pilot and a scientist lead a band of survivors in search of safety. Stars Michael Paré, Leanne Khol Young (2017)

programme.title: Asteroid Final Impact
programme.desc: A disgraced scientist has to use cutting edge satellite technology to save the world from being destroyed by a rogue asteroid. Starring Mark Lutz and Anna Van Hooft (2015).

programme.title: Ice Twisters
programme.desc: Charlie Price, a former scientist turned science fiction author, starts living one of his novels when the Federal Science Foundation's weather experiments escape control and turn disastrous.

programme.title: The Box
programme.desc: A couple receive a box and the offer of one million dollars if they push the button within it. But once it has been pushed, someone they do not know will die. Stars Cameron Diaz, James Marsden (2009)

programme.title: Designed with Love
programme.desc: Sky gets an exciting offer for her clothing line to be featured in a department store. But first, she must prove that she can make $10k worth of sales. (2020)

programme.title: THE STORY OF US
programme.desc: Jamie owns a bookstore called True Love and has helped couples fall in love.

programme.title: Lucky In Love
programme.desc: Mira has a definite idea of what her fantasy life entails.

programme.title: LOVE, OF COURSE
programme.desc: Widower and single mum Amy is ready to rebuild a life of her own as her daughter goes off to college

programme.title: Fashionably Yours
programme.desc: Jaded designer Lauren decides to move back home after three years trying to make her career in Seattle. Lauren soon finds out that the city has more to offer then she could have imagined. (2020)

programme.title: 55 Steps
programme.desc: 55 Steps is based a the inspiring true story of Eleanor Riese, a mental illness patient herself, who brings a class action suit to give competent mental patients the right to have a say in their medication while they're in a hospital, and Colette Hughes, the lawyer appointed to her case.

programme.title: Jumper
programme.desc: The epic adventures of a man who discovers that he possesses the exhilarating ability to instantly teleport anywhere in the world he can imagine.

programme.title: The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Milo Boyd (Gerard Butler), a down-on-his-luck bounty hunter, gets his dream job when he is assigned to track down his bail-jumping ex-wife, reporter Nicole Hurly (Jennifer Aniston).

programme.title: No Man's Land
programme.desc: One mistake will change everything. For one family protecting their land on the Texas-Mexico border is everything but one night when confronted with an immigrant family illegally crossing the border Jackson accidentally kills a young boy.

programme.title: Black Dawn (2005)
programme.desc: CIA agent Jonathan Cold is working undercover to stop a group of Chechnyan terrorists from acquiring and using a nuclear weapon. His cover is blown when his prot�g�e is kidnapped.

programme.title: Flight Of Fury
programme.desc: John is sent in to recover a stolen Stealth Bomber. His trusty sidekick Rojar and John's ever faithful Jessica fight the rebel forces of Banansistan, led by the vivacious Ellianna.

programme.title: Geronimo: An American Legend
programme.desc: A legendary warrior leads the last remaining free Indian tribe against U.S. Army forces intent on their subjugation.

programme.title: Silverado
programme.desc: Four drifters arrive in a small frontier town and become unlikely heroes in a battle against a powerful family and a corrupt sheriff.

programme.title: Rock The Kasbah
programme.desc: ROCK THE KASBAH is the story of 'Richie Vance,' a has-been rock manager who takes his last remaining client on a USO tour of Afghanistan. When Richie finds himself in Kabul, abandoned, penniless and without his passport, he discovers a young girl with an extraordinary voice and manages her through Afghanistan's version of 'American Idol', the wildly popular 'Afghan Star'.

programme.title: 30 Minutes or Less
programme.desc: The tale of three slacker friends and the adventures that ensure after one of them inadvertently robs a bank armed only with a large salami.

programme.title: The Meddler
programme.desc: An aging widow from New York City follows her daughter to Los Angeles in hopes of starting a new life after her husband passes away.

programme.title: Little Black Book
programme.desc: A woman gets more than she bargained for when she goes into her boyfriend's Palm Pilot to learn about his ex-girlfriends.

programme.title: Just a Gigolo
programme.desc: Paul von Przygodski, a young Prussian gentleman, arrives in the trenches in time to be caught in the final explosion of the Great War. After recuperating in a military hospital, where he is mistaken for a French hero, he returns to Berlin. His family home has been turned into a boarding house, his father is paralyzed, and his mother is working in the Turkish baths. Attempting to find a new purpose, his childhood friend, Cilly, abandons him for fame and fortune his former commanding officer, Captain Kraft, tries to persuade him to join his right-wing movement and a widow, Helga von Kaiserling, briefly seduces him with the finer things in life.

programme.title: Magic Beyond Words
programme.desc: For lovers of Harry Potter, Magic Beyond Words is a must see movie. An inspiring look at JK Rowling's rise to become one of the most influential writers-from her humble beginnings, as an imaginative young girl and awkward teenager, to the loss of her mother and the genesis of the Harry Potter phenomenon.

programme.title: Louder Than Words
programme.desc: After the unexpected death of their daughter, a couple work to build a state of the art children's hospital where families are welcomed into the healing process.

programme.title: A Single Man
programme.desc: An adaptation based on a novel by Christopher Isherwood, A SINGLE MAN is a romantic tale of love interrupted, the isolation that is an inherent part of the human condition, and ultimately the importance of the seemingly smaller moments in life. Set in Los Angeles in 1962, at the height of the Cuban missile crisis, A SINGLE MAN, tells the story of a British college professor (Colin Firth) who dwells on the past and cannot see his future. We follow him through a single day, where a series of events and encounters, ultimately leads him to decide if there is a meaning to life after the death of his long time partner, Jim (Matthew Goode).

programme.title: Cold Brook
programme.desc: One fateful evening, after working late hours at the museum, two maintenance workers see a man standing silently near a Civil War exhibit. Despite chasing him away, each night he returns. Soon Ted and George learn that no one else can see the mysterious figure dressed in centuries-old clothing his name is Gil Le Doux and he's searching for a way home.

programme.title: The Sentinel
programme.desc: Pete Garrison is a U.S. Secret Service agent who saved a president's life by jumping in front of a hail of bullets, over twenty years ago. Pete's fellow agent and friend, Charlie Merriweather, hints at wanting to share critical and confidential information. Before that can happen, however, Merriweather is shot dead at his house in a crime that is made to look like a botched robbery.

programme.title: The Three Musketeers
programme.desc: France is in turmoil and a new, naive King finds himself manipulated by the evil Cardinal Richelieu (James Cosmo, Tom Clancy's Jack Ryan). With a corrupt commander of the royal guard by his side the Cardinal employs the expertise of the devious and wicked Milady de Winter in a plot to bring down the monarchy and drag the country into war. As France burns the Cardinal will take control. All that stands between them and victory are the remnants of an elite group who wore loyalty to crown and country.

programme.title: Warriors' Gate
programme.desc: American teenager Jack Bronson is magically transported to ancient China, where he must become a hero and rescue a beautiful princess from the clutches of the evil barbarian king.

programme.title: Behind The Line
programme.desc: Occupied France, 1940. A Nazi Commander discovers one of his prisoners, Danny (Sam Gittins) is a champion boxer. He forces him to fight for his companies entertainment. But the POWs realise they can use these contests, as cover for an audacious breakout, before they're sent to Germany, where escape will be almost impossible. Their fate and freedom may all come down to how long Danny can keep fighting.

programme.title: Epic Safari Encounters

programme.title: Epic Safari Encounters

Will Kristina finally spot her dream leopard?

programme.title: Epic Safari Encounters

programme.title: Epic Safari Encounters

programme.title: Epic Safari Encounters
programme.desc: The safari continues at Bumi Hills Safari Lodge where Kristina joins the anti-poaching unit on their everyday, thrilling duties. The fishing challenges with Madison continue and the breath-taking lakeshore game viewing experiences keep coming.

programme.title: 15th Meridian East
programme.sub-title: Similarity in Difference: From Generation to Generation
programme.desc: The journey leads from the Norwegian Vesterålen to Chad, the Aeolian Islands and the Polish Giant Mountains. As different as the landscapes and cultures may be, all people are united in their love for their children and their desire to give something to tomorrow's generation.

programme.title: Tales from the Underground
programme.desc: Many animals feel at home in our gardens. Some are very popular with garden owners, others should disappear as fast as possible - above all the mole. Its famous hills, the entrances to its basement apartment complete with sleeping kettle, pantry and seemingly endlessly long corridors, adorn to the great displeasure of the gardener, the carefully tended lawn. The film tells the story of the probably most unpopular garden dweller. Through impressive under- and overground shots the viewer gets a picture of an animal that everyone thinks they know, but that hardly anyone ever sees.

programme.title: Asia
programme.sub-title: Secret Lives Hidden Places II: Asia - Secret Lives Hidden Places II: Gir National Park: India – Asia's Last Lion
programme.desc: In the far west of India, unexpected predators roam: lions. Living freely in a human-inhabited area without fences, they occasionally prey on the livestock of the indigenous Maldhari people, who nevertheless take pride in sharing their region with these lions—a unique coexistence of humans and predators. In northern Gujarat, desert landscapes dominate, where semi-nomadic communities breed a unique camel breed capable of swimming: Karai camels swim up to 3km daily to mangrove islands for grazing.

programme.title: Asia
programme.sub-title: Secret Lives Hidden Places II: Asia - Secret Lives Hidden Places II: Kinabatangan River: Borneo – Forgotten Paradise
programme.desc: In Sabah, northern Borneo, flows the 560km-long Kinabatangan River. Nowhere else in Sabah are wild animals as easily spotted as along this river: orangutans, elephants, crocodiles, and proboscis monkeys. However, biodiversity is threatened as more rainforest gives way to palm oil plantations. Wildlife ventures into inhabited areas in search of food, leading to conflicts. Locals are fighting to preserve the rainforest and its unique wildlife, demonstrating that conservation and prosperity can coexist even in a modern society.

programme.title: Asia
programme.sub-title: Secret Lives Hidden Places II: Asia - Secret Lives Hidden Places II: Pu Mat National Park: Vietnam – Of Bears and Men
programme.desc: The jungle in northern Vietnam is nearly impenetrable, with some areas never touched by humans. The remote rainforests of Pu Mat National Park serve as a refuge for endangered wildlife such as black bears, monkeys, and pangolins. Tuan, a biologist and bear specialist, embarks on an expedition to these untouched regions of the park in search of bears. The most hunted animal here is the pangolin, sought after for its scales believed to have medicinal properties and its meat considered a delicacy. A small Vietnamese conservation organization fights for the survival of this species.

programme.title: Asia
programme.sub-title: Secret Lives Hidden Places II: Asia - Secret Lives Hidden Places II: Gaoligongshan Park: China – Himalaya's Gold
programme.desc: The Great Gobi National Park in southwestern Mongolia shelters one of the last populations of wild Bactrian camels, amid its ancient and mysterious desert landscape. With around 800 critically endangered animals, the Gobi remains one of the world's most sparsely inhabited and inhospitable regions, yet its allure is undeniable, offering a captivating backdrop for encounters with wild camels and stories of people deeply connected to nature.

programme.title: Asia
programme.sub-title: Secret Lives Hidden Places II: Asia - Secret Lives Hidden Places II: Great Gobi National Park: Mongolia – Following the Wild Camels
programme.desc: The jungle in northern Vietnam is nearly impenetrable, with some areas never touched by humans. The remote rainforests of Pu Mat National Park serve as a refuge for endangered wildlife such as black bears, monkeys, and pangolins. Tuan, a biologist and bear specialist, embarks on an expedition to these untouched regions of the park in search of bears. The most hunted animal here is the pangolin, sought after for its scales believed to have medicinal properties and its meat considered a delicacy. A small Vietnamese conservation organization fights for the survival of this species.

programme.title: The Secret world of Herbs: The Secret World of Herbs
programme.desc: Its native fragrant flowers and aromatic herbs have made the Provence a brand known worldwide. The wealth of flora found in this region, between the French Alps and the Mediterranean, is unequalled among the French provinces. Around Sault, near Mont Ventoux, the valleys and high plains are carpeted with bright violet: In the hot climate of the South of France, lavender blooms and exudes its fragrance. Monastic healers have been using its aromatic medicinal oil since the Middle Ages. And today an entire industry is based on the trade with this fragrant flower. Yet the livelihood of Provençal lavender farmers is imperiled. In France's major lavender-growing region, the “Plateau de Valensole”, our viewers encounter Gérard Blanc, who has been hit particularly hard. The lavender farmer lost sixty percent of his harvest to one tiny insect: the leafhopper. This insect has already destroyed half of the lavender acreage, bumping France from its market position as the world's top producer of lavender oil. The film visits a resolute farmer who, not about to give up, is testing methods to fend off the voracious insect.

programme.title: Super Senses

programme.title: Super Senses

programme.title: Echo And The Elephants Of Amboseli
programme.desc: In Amboseli, the harsh drought is tightening its grip. Echo and all the elephant families go to sleep and wake up hungry. Rain is falling, but in dangerous areas, drawing elephants into increasing conflict with farmers.

programme.title: Frontier Vets
programme.desc: Niven struggles to vaccinate a nervous dog during a rabies vaccination campaign - will he see the task through, or will his impatient nature let him down?

programme.title: SafariLIVE Sunset
programme.desc: As the sun sets in Africa, join a LIVE safari and ask the guide questions in real time.

programme.title: SafariLIVE Sunrise Repeat
programme.desc: If you missed the LIVE show then catch up with your sunrise/sunset safari here.

programme.title: Oliver's Twist
programme.desc: The Big Cheese: Jamie is visiting his friend, Patricia Michelson, in her new cheese shop in London.

programme.title: Oliver's Twist
programme.desc: Night Shift: Jamie has gone to his restaurant, Fifteen, to help his baker, John Rolfe, with the night shift.

programme.title: Jamie's Super Food
programme.desc: Jamie's in the Nicoyan Peninsula in Costa Rica, where he joins fisherman Otto for a meal of freshly caught fish with family and friends on the beach.

programme.title: Jamie's 30 Minute Meals
programme.desc: Steak Sarnie - Jamie Oliver cooks the perfect steak with crispy new potatoes, cheesy mushrooms and beetroot salad.

programme.title: Jamie's 30 Minute Meals
programme.desc: Chicken Pie - Jamie makes chicken pie with French-style peas, sweet carrot smash, and chantilly cream.

programme.title: Jamie & Jimmy's Food Fight Club
programme.desc: Jessica Chastain: The boys recreate one of Jessica Chastain's favorite meals in an all-vegan menu.

programme.title: Jamie's Kitchen
programme.desc: While Jamie Oliver is on paternity leave the trainee chefs begin to slack off.

programme.title: Jamie's Easy Meals for Every Day
programme.desc: Jamie takes mushrooms to a whole new level with his deliciously cheesy baked mushroom soup, and gives a classic salad a tasty twist with his stunning cauliflower remoulade.

programme.title: Jamie's Easy Meals for Every Day
programme.desc: Jamie cooks his incredible avocado pastry quiche, with a delicious cheesy and basil filling, and shows us how to take a classic steak to the next level.

programme.title: Jamie's Comfort Food
programme.desc: Jamie and his old friend and mentor, Gennaro Contaldo, make bolognese ravioli from scratch – with pops of beautiful bolognese inside parcels of homemade royal pasta dough, all served in a silky tomato sauce.

programme.title: Jamie & Jimmy's Food Fight Club
programme.desc: Desserts - Jimmy and Jamie want to see if British puds can beat Italian desserts. Jonathan Ross pops into the caff to cook extra-special bread and butter pudding with the boys and to take on the 'After Eight challenge.'

programme.title: North West Dessert
programme.desc: Its the North West's chefs' last chance to impress before the final two chefs are chosen to face the Great British Menu judging panel. Which dessert will help get two chefs through?

programme.title: North West Judging

programme.desc: Its the curtain raiser as the Central chefs go all out. Three culinary heavyweights return, two Michelin star chef Daniel Clifford, Michelin star Richard Bainbridge and Will Holland who has beaten them both before in the Great British Menu kitchen.

programme.desc: The chefs cook their fish courses. Daniel Clifford puts up a creative dish called Catch of the Day. Richard Bainbridges dish is titled Tongue in Cheek. And Will Hollands dish - Coconut poached brill, crab, celeriac and tomato essence.

programme.title: SCL 2017 Season 4, Episode 4, Holland
programme.desc: The battle of the Dutch will take place this edition in Lichtenvoorde, a place very well known in Holland because of the famous “Black Cross”. The athletes will compete over six heavy events and the winner gets 25 Strongman Champions League ranking points.

programme.title: SCL 2017 Season 4, Episode 5, Serbia
programme.desc: Set in the beautiful mountain resort Zlatibor, the fifth stage of the Strongman Champions League 2017 sees 14 athletes from across the world competing for the gold medal of SCL Serbia 2017. The event welcomes top-athlete - and odds-on favourite - Matjaz Belsak (Slovenia), who has presented himself in an impressive shape so far. Can his opponents defeat him?

programme.title: SCL 2017 Season 4, Episode 6, Canada (Part 1)
programme.desc: The next two stages take place in Quebec. With eight events over two days, SCL Canada is a true ‘heavyweight'. The athletes compete in: Truck Pull, Deadlift with cars, Log Lift, and the Atlas Stones. The World's Strongest Viking Jean-Francois Caron from Canada is a favourite, as well as current SCL leader Matjaz Belsak (Slovenia) and promising underdog Jimmy Paquet (Canada).

programme.title: SCL 2017 Season 4, Episode 7, Canada (Part 2)
programme.desc: Welcome to the second day in Quebec. The athletes are fighting hard to win this two-day event. The last points of this SCL stage can be won over four outstanding disciplines: Power Stairs, Dumbbell Press, Keg Toss, and finally, the legendary Farmer's Walk. Who will leave Canada with the yellow ‘Leader Shirt'?

programme.title: SCL 2017 Season 4, Episode 8, Finland (Part 1)
programme.desc: Stages 8 and 9 of the SCL are hosted in Vaasa, Finland, taking place over a spectacular two-day event. After 3 wins so far, Matjaz Belsak from Slovenia plans to extend his lead at the top of the table. Among the other 13 highly motivated strongmen, two SCL legends will make their comeback to the competition: Former World Champion of 2015, Krzysztof Radzikowski (Poland) and Dainis Zageris (Latvia).

programme.title: SCL 2017 Season 4, Episode 9, Finland (Part 2)
programme.desc: The fight for the Finnish trophy continues. In this unmissable SCL event, the strongmen battle for the win in the Carry and Drag, the Forward Hold, Deadlifting with Cars and the Loading Race. Belsak, Radzikowski and Zageris look good after the first day, but the others haven't given up yet.

programme.title: SCL 2023 Season 9, Stage 7
programme.desc: Strongman Champions League World Record Breakers 2023 starts with a 25-ton snow plow! Crazy machines are pulled and pushed, with many kilograms moved. A few new world records are set in this competition.
